MARIE THERESE.activite_verifiee: Marie-Thérèse Retirement Home Association — non-profit private EHPAD with religious dimension, 277 bd Raspail Paris 14th. 128 beds including 13 in an Alzheimer unit, mainly receives elderly priests. Run by the Compagnie des Filles de la Charité.

ASSOCIATION POUR DEVELOPPE SANTE DES FEM.activite_verifiee: ADSF — Acting for Women's Health, apolitical and non-confessional association created in 2001. Improves access to care for women in extreme exclusion (homeless, victims of violence, trafficking) through street rounds, day centres in Paris 18th and Lille.

CITETHEATRE.activite_verifiee: Cité-Théâtre Association (SIREN 820959682), 21 bd Jourdan Paris 14th. 1901-act association created in 2016, running the Théâtre de la Cité internationale project, heir to the pacifist utopia of the 1925 Cité universitaire. Grant-funded by the Ministry of Culture (DRAC IdF).

PROJETS19.activite_verifiee: Projets-19, local-development association created in December 1997, based in the 18th and 19th arrondissements of Paris (HQ 9 rue Mathis 75019). Employment and business-creation support, mainly in priority urban-policy neighbourhoods of north-east Paris.

AOCSA LA 20 EME CHAISE.activite_verifiee: AOCSA — La 20e Chaise, social and sociocultural centre founded in 2006-2007 by residents of the Amandiers neighbourhood (Paris 20th), 38 rue des Amandiers. Workshops (cooking, yoga, sewing), French classes, school support, parenting support.

CROCOS CRECHE PARENTAL.activite_verifiee: Les Crocos, community parental crèche created in 1984, 180 avenue Daumesnil Paris 12th. Receives 20 children aged 2.5 months to under 4 years; participatory operation with weekly parental sessions alongside a team of 6 early-childhood professionals.

ASSOCIATION LES CROCOS CRECHE PARENTAL.activite_verifiee: Les Crocos, community parental crèche created in 1984, 180 avenue Daumesnil Paris 12th. Receives 20 children aged 2.5 months to under 4 years; participatory operation with weekly parental sessions alongside a team of 6 early-childhood professionals.

HUMANDO.activite_verifiee: Humando — Inclusion Temporary Work Enterprise (ETTI) state-approved, network of 63 agencies in France (including several in Île-de-France, Paris 15 agency at 4 rue Firmin Gillot). Places people far from employment in temporary work in construction, green spaces, logistics, catering.

FONDATION AGIR CONTRE L EXCLUSION.activite_verifiee: FACE — Foundation Acting Against Exclusion, recognised as being of public utility in 1994 (created in 1993 by Martine Aubry). Mobilises companies and employees for inclusion: 77 structures, 40 territorial clubs. FACE Paris is a club created in 2006 with the City of Paris to link companies and territory.

ENTREPRENEURS DU MONDE.activite_verifiee: Entrepreneurs du Monde, French association recognised as being of public utility created in 1998, HQ in Lyon. Supports the socio-economic inclusion of people in extreme precarity in Africa, Asia, Haiti and France through micro-credit, savings, training, energy support.

ASSOCIATION CHARONNE.activite_verifiee: Charonne association — Parisian medico-social operator in addiction care and harm reduction. Runs several CAARUDs and CSAPAs (Beaurepaire Paris 10th, bd Ney Paris 18th including a women's space). Has since been brought closer to the Aurore association group.

MOTIVEA.activite_verifiee: Association / body working in the field of professional inclusion in Paris (limited public information).

LYCEE TECHNOLOGIQUE JACQUES MONOD.activite_verifiee: Jacques Monod multidisciplinary public lycée, 12 rue Victor Cousin Paris 5th. General, technological and vocational training, particularly in health and social fields (nursing-aide school). Transfer planned to Lycée Villon in September 2026.

D2L.activite_verifiee: D2L — Local Bond Development, association running an inclusion workshop: painting, electrical, plumbing, building finishing trades and green spaces for social-housing operators, associations and companies, with social support and training as Building Maintenance Officer.

COLLEGE ALBERTO GIACOMETTI.activite_verifiee: Public middle school Alberto Giacometti, 7 rue du Cange Paris 14th. Secondary establishment of the Paris academy with SEGPA section.

VIF TRANSPORT LOGISTIQUE.activite_verifiee: VIF! Transport & Logistics, inclusion logistics platform created in 2016 within the French Red Cross group (Croix-Rouge insertion). HQ in Pantin (93). Includes audiences far from employment in forklift, warehouse, driver trades; notably runs FEAD food aid and the Red Cross's Île-de-France textile collection.

QUEL UNIVERS INVENTER.activite_verifiee: Cultural and performance association Quel Univers Inventer, 43 rue des Bois Paris 19th (limited detailed public information).

CABANE A JEUX.activite_verifiee: Cabane à Jeux association created in 2011 by toy-library professionals, runs the Denise Garon Toy Library (8 square Dunois Paris 13th). Animates play spaces for children, teenagers and families.

FEDER FRANCAISE GYMNASTIQUE.activite_verifiee: French Gymnastics Federation (FFGym), 1901-act association recognised as being of public utility, delegated federation under the Ministry of Sports. HQ: 7 ter cour des Petites Écuries Paris 10th. Animates affiliated clubs and redistributes territorial grants (National Sports Agency).

DIAGNOSTIC ET TRAJECTOIRES.activite_verifiee: Diagnostic et Trajectoires association (SIREN 797776630), active since 2013, HQ 3 rue Meynadier Paris 19th. Studies populations living in informal habitat (shantytowns, squats) — particularly Eastern European migrants — and supports public policies on resorption and social inclusion.

CTRE NAL DRAMAT CONTEMP THEAT OUV.activite_verifiee: Théâtre Ouvert — National Centre for Contemporary Dramaturgy, founded in 1971 by Lucien and Micheline Attoun at the Avignon Festival. First national drama-creation centre dedicated to contemporary writing. Located at 159 avenue Gambetta Paris 20th since 2020.

GROUPE RECHERCHE ECHANGES TECHNOLOG.activite_verifiee: GRET — Group for Research and Technological Exchanges, international solidarity NGO created in 1976. ~700 staff, ~200 projects in 26 countries (Africa, Asia) on access to essential services, agriculture, microfinance. HQ: 45 bis avenue de la Belle Gabrielle, Nogent-sur-Marne (94).

ENTOURAGE.activite_verifiee: Entourage association, created in 2014, HQ in Paris. Recreates social bonds between residents and homeless people through 3 programmes: Entourage Local (neighbourhood app), Entourage Pro (solidarity employment network) and Entourage Sport (re-mobilisation through sport).

PARRAINS PAR MILLE.activite_verifiee: Parrains Par Mille (PPM), association created in 1990 specialised in the local sponsorship of isolated children and young people (living with families or supported by the ASE, including unaccompanied minors). PPM75 (Paris) has been a departmental delegation since 2022. ~1,400 children supported in 2024.

ASSOCIATION PARRAINS PAR MILLE.activite_verifiee: Parrains Par Mille (PPM), association created in 1990 specialised in the local sponsorship of isolated children and young people (living with families or supported by the ASE, including unaccompanied minors). PPM75 (Paris) has been a departmental delegation since 2022. ~1,400 children supported in 2024.

ASS PARRAINS PAR MILLE.activite_verifiee: Parrains Par Mille (PPM), association created in 1990 specialised in the local sponsorship of isolated children and young people (living with families or supported by the ASE, including unaccompanied minors). PPM75 (Paris) has been a departmental delegation since 2022. ~1,400 children supported in 2024.

ASSOCIATION LES ENFANCES.activite_verifiee: Les Enfances association, parental crèche / early-childhood reception facility, 33 rue Boucry Paris 18th. Receives children from diverse families, including deaf or hard-of-hearing children and staff (introduction to French Sign Language), embedded in neighbourhood life.

ASSOCIATION DEDALE.activite_verifiee: Dédale — European agency dedicated to culture, new technologies and social innovation. Runs the Emergences festival, the d-lab (artist support and residencies), the Paris Sud SmartCity Living Lab and various research programmes (Future Heritage, Playgreen). Supported by the European Commission, Ministry of Culture, Île-de-France region and City of Paris.

CHANTIER ECOLE ILE DE FRANCE.activite_verifiee: CHANTIER école Île-de-France, Île-de-France delegation of the national CHANTIER école network (created in 2001). Network of inclusion-through-economic-activity (IAE) actors: 70 structures running Inclusion Workshops (ACI). Professionalisation (ETAIE training), institutional representation.

OFFICE CENTR COOPERAT ECOLE PARIS.activite_verifiee: OCCE — Central Office for School Cooperation, 1901-act association recognised as being of public utility since 1968 (created in 1928). Federal HQ 101 bis rue du Ranelagh Paris 16th. Supports 45,000 school cooperatives and associations, 102 departmental associations, 5 million member students and educators.

PASS W.activite_verifiee: Municipal scheme/programme to support Parisian families (City of Paris cards and passes — Paris Pass Familles, single-parent family card, etc.).

CENTRE FORMATION FOOTBALL PARIS.activite_verifiee: Football training centre based in Paris or Île-de-France (PSG Campus Saint-Germain-en-Laye / Paris FC at Orly). Trains and develops young footballers from U11 to U19.

FONDAT ABBE PIERRE LOGEMENT DEFAVOR.activite_verifiee: Foundation for the Housing of Disadvantaged People (formerly Fondation Abbé-Pierre), recognised as being of public utility in 1992. HQ 3/5 rue de Romainville Paris 19th. Funds the construction of very social housing, fights bad housing, supports ~900 community projects/year.

ATHEVAINS.activite_verifiee: Compagnie Les Athévains / Artistic Athévains, directed by Anne-Marie Lazarini and Dominique Bourde. Has run the Théâtre Artistic (Paris 11th) since 1979. Programmes lesser-known classical texts, contemporary creations, pocket operas.

RACING MULTI ATHLON.activite_verifiee: Racing Multi Athlon (RMA), Parisian multi-sport club founded in 2011 from the modern-pentathlon section of Lagardère Paris Racing. Over 850 members in 4 sections (modern pentathlon, triathlon, athletics, fencing).

CTE ORG CHAMP MONDE HANDBALL MAS 20.activite_verifiee: Organising Committee of the 2017 World Handball Championship (France, January 2017), 1901-act association, HQ in Boulogne-Billancourt (92). Temporary structure chaired by Joël Delplanque (FFHandball president) to organise the 25th edition in 8 cities including Paris.

FAB CITY GRAND PARIS.activite_verifiee: Fab City Grand Paris, local consortium association of the Fab City movement (initiated in Barcelona in 2011). Network of about thirty Parisian actors (fablabs, makers, architects, urban farms) committed to relocalising production and the circular economy. Runs the Fab City Hub Paris and digital-fabrication training.

FONDATION D ENTREPRISE P S G.activite_verifiee: Paris Saint-Germain Foundation, corporate foundation of the PSG club created in 2000 (first foundation of a French club). Supports the social and professional inclusion of young people in difficulty, organises educational and sports activities for children from disadvantaged neighbourhoods (~400 operations/year, 18-20,000 children).

ASSOCIATION LOISIRS PLURIEL DE PARI.activite_verifiee: Loisirs Pluriel, association founded in 1992 by parents of children with disabilities. Inclusive leisure and youth centres receiving able-bodied and disabled children equally (3-18 years). Network of 31 centres in France including several in Paris (6th, 13th, 19th).

LOISIRS PLURIEL 19EME.activite_verifiee: Loisirs Pluriel, association founded in 1992 by parents of children with disabilities. Inclusive leisure and youth centres receiving able-bodied and disabled children equally (3-18 years). Network of 31 centres in France including several in Paris (6th, 13th, 19th).

LOISIRS PLURIEL DE PARIS 6.activite_verifiee: Loisirs Pluriel, association founded in 1992 by parents of children with disabilities. Inclusive leisure and youth centres receiving able-bodied and disabled children equally (3-18 years). Network of 31 centres in France including several in Paris (6th, 13th, 19th).

ASSOCIATION LOISIRS PLURIEL DE PARIS 6.activite_verifiee: Loisirs Pluriel, association founded in 1992 by parents of children with disabilities. Inclusive leisure and youth centres receiving able-bodied and disabled children equally (3-18 years). Network of 31 centres in France including several in Paris (6th, 13th, 19th).

PARIS AIDE AUX VICTIMES.activite_verifiee: Paris Aide aux Victimes (PAV / PAV75), association created in 1987 approved by the Ministry of Justice. Listening, reception, information on rights, psychological and legal support for victims of crimes, disasters and accidents. HQ 12 rue Charles Fourier Paris 13th; branches in Paris 17th and 20th.

ASSOCIATION PARIS AIDE AUX VICTIMES.activite_verifiee: Paris Aide aux Victimes (PAV / PAV75), association created in 1987 approved by the Ministry of Justice. Listening, reception, information on rights, psychological and legal support for victims of crimes, disasters and accidents. HQ 12 rue Charles Fourier Paris 13th; branches in Paris 17th and 20th.

KELBONGOO.activite_verifiee: Kelbongoo, social-and-solidarity-economy enterprise (ESUS-approved) created in 2013 by Léa Barbier and Richard Fielding. Distributes local farm produce in short supply chains at affordable prices in mixed and working-class neighbourhoods; 4 shops in Paris (10th, 19th, two in the 20th) and pickup points in Seine-Saint-Denis.

FOOD DE RUE FOOD2RUE.activite_verifiee: Food2Rue — Street Food, association created in 2014 (SIREN 810505180). Inclusion of women far from employment in food trades through La Panaméenne (Paris 14th) and Labelle Gabrielle workshops. Activity cooperative for the creation of street-food micro-enterprises. (Judicial liquidation initiated in October 2024.)

MAISON BAKHITA.activite_verifiee: Maison Bakhita, association of the Diocese of Paris inaugurated on 25 September 2021 at 5 ter rue Jean Cottin (Paris 18th). Resource centre supporting exiled people: volunteer training, intercultural workshops, professional, social and cultural inclusion pathways.

COLLEGE PIERRE MENDES FRANCE.activite_verifiee: Public Paris middle school (PIERRE MENDES FRANCE), secondary education establishment of the Paris academy. Grants paid by the City of Paris for equipment, educational projects, school trips and/or catering.

COLLEGE LA GRANGE AUX BELLES.activite_verifiee: Public Paris middle school (LA GRANGE AUX BELLES), secondary education establishment of the Paris academy. Grants paid by the City of Paris for equipment, educational projects, school trips and/or catering.

COLLEGE BERNARD PALISSY.activite_verifiee: Public Paris middle school (BERNARD PALISSY), secondary education establishment of the Paris academy. Grants paid by the City of Paris for equipment, educational projects, school trips and/or catering.

COLLEGE CLAUDE MONET.activite_verifiee: Public Paris middle school (CLAUDE MONET), secondary education establishment of the Paris academy. Grants paid by the City of Paris for equipment, educational projects, school trips and/or catering.

COLLEGE JEAN BAPTISTE SAY.activite_verifiee: Public Paris middle school (JEAN BAPTISTE SAY), secondary education establishment of the Paris academy. Grants paid by the City of Paris for equipment, educational projects, school trips and/or catering.

LYCEE PROFESSIONNEL RENE CASSIN.activite_verifiee: Public Paris vocational lycée (RENE CASSIN), secondary education establishment of the Paris academy. Grants paid by the City of Paris for equipment, educational projects, trips or school catering.

SUEZ RV REBOND INSERTION.activite_verifiee: SUEZ RV Rebond Insertion, inclusion temporary work enterprise (ETTI) created in 2002 by SUEZ (11 establishments in France). Paris HQ 3 rue Rouvet Paris 19th. Includes people far from employment over 2 years in recycling, building, logistics, cleaning trades. 10,000+ people supported, 6,500 returns to employment.

PETITE LILI.activite_verifiee: Association La Petite Lili, 100% inclusive Parisian community structure; runs notably the restaurant Le République, job creation and integration of people with disabilities or far from employment.

RES PARIS ATEL VELO PART SOLID.activite_verifiee: RéPAR — Parisian Network of Participatory and Solidarity Bike Workshops, created in 2018. Federates Parisian solidarity bike workshops (Cyclofficine, SoliCycle, Vélorution, Le Petit Biclou, La Cycklette, Paillettes et Cambouis, etc.) to develop cycling, learn mechanics, encourage reuse and fight obsolescence.

CRECHE AVENIR.activite_verifiee: Association Crèche Avenir (SIREN 339735318), community collective crèche created in 1989, 38-40 rue des Annelets Paris 19th. 22 places, receives children aged 3 months to 3 years from Monday to Friday 7:30am-7pm.

ASSOCIATION ECOLE SCHOOL FOR TODAY.activite_verifiee: L'École Aujourd'hui — School for Today, contracted private secular and mixed primary school, founded in 1975 by teachers. 24 boulevard Edgar Quinet Paris 14th, ~140 students from PS to CM2. Pedagogy inspired by new and institutional education.

ECOLE SCHOOL FOR TODAY.activite_verifiee: L'École Aujourd'hui — School for Today, contracted private secular and mixed primary school, founded in 1975 by teachers. 24 boulevard Edgar Quinet Paris 14th, ~140 students from PS to CM2. Pedagogy inspired by new and institutional education.

PIMMS DE PARIS.activite_verifiee: PIMMS de Paris association (Information Mediation Multi-Service Points), created on 27 May 2004. Social-mediation structure: facilitates the link between Paris residents, public services and administrations. 5 fixed points (Paris East, North-East, North-West, South, South-East) labelled France Services. 44,136 users in 2024.

COOPERATIVE INDIGO.activite_verifiee: La Coopérative Indigo (SIREN 795097112), association created in 2012 by Stéphane de Freitas (Paris 16th). Solidarity exchange platform (Digo collaborative currency) and Eloquentia programme (learning public speaking in lycées and universities). ~7,000 users in Île-de-France.

ECOD AIR EI.activite_verifiee: Ecodair, solidarity IT-refurbishment enterprise created in Paris in 2004. Three structures (ESAT, Adapted Enterprise, Inclusion Enterprise); 70% of staff with mental disabilities or in inclusion pathways. ~50,000 devices refurbished/year. 5 sites in France (Paris, Saclay, Marseille, Lyon, Nantes).

NOVEMPLOI.activite_verifiee: Novemploi, Parisian intermediate association founded in 1990 (state-approved). Provides individuals, associations and companies with unemployed people in social difficulty, with socio-professional support (building, cleaning, collective catering, security). 10,000+ Parisians supported in 34 years.

NATIONALE DE READAPTATION SOCIALE.activite_verifiee: ANRS — National Association for Social Rehabilitation, created in 1961, recognised as being of public utility in 1975. HQ 18 avenue Victoria Paris 1st. Initial mission of preventing prostitution extended to protecting young people at risk (notably unaccompanied minors, Synergie service). Runs 10 facilities in Paris and Val-d'Oise.

COOP MIJOTEE.activite_verifiee: La Coop Mijotée, social-and-solidarity-economy association created in 2017, 77 rue de la Fontaine au Roi Paris 11th. Solidarity caterer and solidarity canteens (Cantine de Babelville, Cantine des Mûriers in the 20th). ~450 meals/day at solidarity prices; ~70 inclusion staff over 5 years.

PARIS BASKET 18E.activite_verifiee: Paris Basket 18 (PB18), Parisian basketball club exclusively for women, 15 passage Ramey Paris 18th. 3,500 young people introduced each year (from age 8) through basketball schools (Maryse-Hiltz gym in the 20th, Doudeauville in the 18th) and introductions to ~2,500 schoolchildren. School support, outings, inclusion projects for girls from working-class neighbourhoods.

AFG.activite_verifiee: Entity appearing under the AFG acronym in Paris grants: probably France Généalogique (CEGF), Parisian genealogy association created in 1953, or the French Genealogy Federation (FFG). Further research recommended.

FIGUIER.activite_verifiee: Le Figuier association (Paris), community structure. Limited public information — likely active in the Paris social/solidarity field.

TOWARDS CONSEIL.activite_verifiee: Towards Conseil, advisory structure in Paris — limited public information on exact identity.

BUDGET ANNEXE AIDE SOCIALE A L ENFANCE.activite_verifiee: Annex Budget for Child Welfare (ASE) of the City of Paris — autonomous budget devoted to Parisian child-protection facilities. Funded overwhelmingly by the City's general budget (~97% in 2024), covers operating expenses (~€75M) and investments (~€4M).

FLORA TRISTAN REGIE QUARTIER 14EME.activite_verifiee: Flora Tristan — Neighbourhood works-management body of the 14th arrondissement, based in the Didot-Porte de Vanves QPV since 2007. SIREN 500266408, 2 rue Prévost Paradol Paris 14th. Inclusion through economic activity (green-space, street, building maintenance) for social-housing operators and neighbourhood companies.

PASS SPORT S POUR L EMPLOI.activite_verifiee: Pass'Sport(s) pour l'Emploi (SIREN 923620801), association created in 2017 in Paris 20th by Benoît Campargue (former top-level judoka) and Thierry Marx. Trains people far from employment in 12 weeks for security-officer and sports-instructor jobs, with promise of hire in partnership with companies.

ASS VOTRE ECOLE CHEZ VOUS.activite_verifiee: Votre École Chez Vous (VECV), association founded in 1954, recognised as being of public utility in 1985. HQ 29 rue Merlin Paris 11th. The only French association providing free individual at-home schooling (kindergarten to lycée) for sick or disabled children and adolescents — ~150 students/year, 5,000+ young people in 70 years.

ASSOCIATION VOTRE ECOLE CHEZ VOUS.activite_verifiee: Votre École Chez Vous (VECV), association founded in 1954, recognised as being of public utility in 1985. HQ 29 rue Merlin Paris 11th. The only French association providing free individual at-home schooling (kindergarten to lycée) for sick or disabled children and adolescents — ~150 students/year, 5,000+ young people in 70 years.

VOTRE ECOLE CHEZ VOUS.activite_verifiee: Votre École Chez Vous (VECV), association founded in 1954, recognised as being of public utility in 1985. HQ 29 rue Merlin Paris 11th. The only French association providing free individual at-home schooling (kindergarten to lycée) for sick or disabled children and adolescents — ~150 students/year, 5,000+ young people in 70 years.

IRONHACK FRANCE ALUMNI.activite_verifiee: Ironhack, international tech school offering intensive bootcamps (web development, data analytics, UX/UI, cybersecurity, AI) on the Paris campus and online. Certified training (RNCP34066, RNCP39618 bachelor's level). ~75% placement within 3 months. Present in Paris.

SQUARE BANDE CRECHE PARENTALE.activite_verifiee: Square Bande Crèche Parentale (SIREN 332061126), community parental crèche created in 1984, 5 rue du Général Guilhem Paris 11th. 12 places for children aged 3 months to 3 years, strong parental involvement (sessions, association management), active pedagogy.

CENTRE ACCUEIL MEDIC REINSER.activite_verifiee: CAMRES — Medical Reception and Economic and Social Reintegration Centre, Parisian association (Paris 10th, SIREN 403184260). Reception and support for people in precarity through social and educational mediation, work on economic and social inclusion.

AOUT SECOURS ALIMENTAIRE.activite_verifiee: Août Secours Alimentaire (ASA), association created in 1994 in Saint-Lambert de Vaugirard. 57 rue Bobillot Paris 13th. Distributes 1+ million meal baskets from 15 July to the end of August in 9 centres (including 5 in Paris), when most food-aid associations are closed. ~15,000 people helped in Paris.

SAFE.activite_verifiee: SAFE Association, Parisian community structure listed on the Je m'engage Paris citizen platform. Detailed publicly available activities limited.

3 CHEMINS.activite_verifiee: 3 Chemins, association created on 13 January 2020 in Paris. Solidarity restaurant and multicultural festive venue; organises cultural, solidarity and culinary events, training workshops, solidarity catering.

ERDA EDUCATION RECHERCHE.activite_verifiee: ERDA — Education Research Artistic Development (SIREN 391961513), association created on 14 September 1988, 23 rue d'Anjou Paris 8th. Runs two major musical ensembles: the Accentus chamber choir and the Insula Orchestra period-instrument orchestra (Laurence Equilbey). Arts education, musicological research, contemporary creation.

HALTE GARDERIE DU GRAND PAVOIS.activite_verifiee: Le Grand Pavois, community parental drop-in nursery, 189 rue de Lourmel Paris 15th. 20 places for children aged 3 months to 3 years, open Monday-Thursday 8:45am-5:45pm and Friday 8:45am-4:45pm. Receives each child up to 3 half-days or full days per week.

CIRCUSNEXT.activite_verifiee: circusnext, Paris-based association born of the Jeunes Talents Cirque programme (2001-2002, Ministry of Culture). Coordinates the only European contemporary-circus platform supported by the European Commission, federating 24 member venues in 15 countries. Identifies and supports emerging contemporary-circus authors (residencies, grants, distribution).

CONCERTS PASDELOUP.activite_verifiee: Orchestre Pasdeloup (Concerts Pasdeloup), oldest Parisian community symphony orchestra, founded in 1861 by Jules Pasdeloup under the name 'Concerts populaires'. Performs at the Philharmonie de Paris, Salle Gaveau, La Seine Musicale. Eclectic repertoire from classical to contemporary, with jazz/cinema/dance creations.

CENTRE INFORMATION DOCUMENT JEUNESS.activite_verifiee: CIDJ — Youth Information and Documentation Centre, association created in 1969 by the Ministry of Youth and Sports. 4 place du Louvre Paris 1st. Freely informs all young people on studies, career guidance, employment, apprenticeship, international mobility, housing, rights. Head of a network of 1,300 Info Jeunesse structures (BIJ/PIJ).

OEUVRES DES OTAGES.activite_verifiee: Œuvre des Otages — limited detailed public information; likely an association supporting vulnerable groups in Paris.

ASSOCIATION OEUVRES DES OTAGES.activite_verifiee: Œuvre des Otages — limited detailed public information; likely an association supporting vulnerable groups in Paris.

ASSOCIATION CULTURE 2.activite_verifiee: Culture 2+ Association — Parisian cultural structure, limited detailed public information.

CREDIT AGRICOLE SA.activite_verifiee: Crédit Agricole SA, listed limited company (SIREN 784608416), listed central body of the mutualist banking group Crédit Agricole. Retail banking, financing and investment banking, asset management. HQ: 12 place des États-Unis, Montrouge (92).

CREDIT LYONNAIS.activite_verifiee: LCL — Le Crédit Lyonnais (SIREN 954509741), retail-banking subsidiary of the Crédit Agricole group since 2003. National branch network; HQ: 20 avenue de Paris, Villejuif (94).

BNP PARIBAS.activite_verifiee: BNP Paribas (SIREN 662042449), international listed banking and financial group, HQ 16 boulevard des Italiens Paris 9th. Retail banking in France, financing and investment banking, asset management and specialised financial services.

CTRE NATION RECHERCHE SCIENTIFIQUE.activite_verifiee: CNRS — National Centre for Scientific Research, public scientific and technological institution (EPST) created in 1939, under the ministry responsible for research. HQ: 3 rue Michel-Ange Paris 16th. ~33,000 staff, 1,000 laboratories covering all scientific disciplines.

ENFANCES.activite_verifiee: Les Enfances (association), parental crèche / early-childhood facility in the 18th arrondissement (Porte de la Chapelle). Receives families of various origins, introduction to French Sign Language, embedded in neighbourhood life.

OPTIM EMPLOI.activite_verifiee: Optim'Emploi (SIREN 390232916), professional-inclusion association 17-19 rue de Cîteaux Paris 12th. 30+ years of activity in social reception, collective catering, home services then construction, logistics, driver-delivery. 100-199 staff in 2023 (SIAE / intermediate association).

CCENTRE OROT ENTRAIDE.activite_verifiee: Centre Orot Entraide, Jewish-community social-aid association in Paris. Limited detailed public information; listed in the directory of the Unified Jewish Social Fund (FSJU).

CETEC A2F.activite_verifiee: CETEC A2F (SIREN 392655346), association created in 1993 by sociologists, psychologists, doctors and social workers. 6 bis rue de Châtillon Paris 14th. Qualiopi-certified training body: training for early-childhood professionals, SST, City of Paris partnership for crèche-staff training.

COMITE ACTIONS LOGEMENT.activite_verifiee: Comité Actions Logement (CAL) — today Droits & Habitats Association, created in 2004, 25 rue de la Charbonnière Paris 18th. Supports badly-housed people, those threatened with eviction or homeless. ~2,000 households supported, ~800 rehoused. Participates in the Fondation Abbé-Pierre's SOS Taudis programme.

PARIS 2018.activite_verifiee: Paris 2018 — 10th edition of the Gay Games, international LGBT multi-sports and cultural event held in Paris from 4 to 12 August 2018. ~10,000 athletes from 91 countries, 36 sports and cultural disciplines, organised by an association committee backed by the City of Paris. Economic impact estimated at ~€100M.

CIRQUE A L ANCIENNE.activite_verifiee: Le Cirque à l'Ancienne, company founded in May 1974 by Silvia Monfort and Alexis Gruss. Pioneer of the equestrian-circus revival in France (École au Carré, annual themed shows). Historical inspiration (19th century); places the horse at the heart of creation.

RIBAMBELLE.activite_verifiee: La Ribambelle, Parisian community crèche 41-45 rue de Javel Paris 15th (La Maison des Bout'chou network). Receives children from walking age to 4 years from Monday to Friday, multidisciplinary early-childhood team, awakening activities and artistic workshops.

INITIAT RENC ET SOLID 10.activite_verifiee: AIRES 10 — 10th-arrondissement Initiatives, Encounters and Solidarity Association. Community centre of the 10th with a comprehensive and intergenerational vocation. Neighbourhood activities, social bonds and solidarity development.

OEUV CHAUSS MAI CENT ETU ACT SOC IN.activite_verifiee: Œuvre des Chaussetiers (May) — Centre for Studies and Social Action. Historic Parisian structure in the social-action and inclusion field. Limited public details.

UNION NATIONALE DU SPORT SCOLAIRE.activite_verifiee: UNSS — National Union for School Sport (SIREN 775675655), federation of secondary-school sport under the Ministry of National Education. HQ 13 rue Saint-Lazare Paris 9th. 2nd-largest French sports federation with ~1,040,000 members (middle-school and lycée students) in school sports associations.

HOMEMAKERS.activite_verifiee: HomeMakers (SIREN 793013293), Parisian inclusive fab lab (Paris 16th) active since January 2019, dedicated to textile, design and new future-of-work professions. Member of Fab City Grand Paris and the French Fablab Network. Skills transmission to women and young people in difficulty; SSE, circular economy. (Activity ceased in July 2024.)

COMITE D ORGANI FRANCE VOLLEY.activite_verifiee: France Volley Organising Committee (CO France Volley), sports association based in Choisy-le-Roi (94). Prepares, finances and organises major sporting events entrusted to the French Volleyball Federation (FFVB) on national territory.

ARS LONGA.activite_verifiee: Ars Longa, Parisian contemporary-art association, 67 avenue Parmentier Paris 11th. Emerging-artist residencies, workshops, distribution of contemporary creation.

SOLIDARITE THERAPEUTIQ INITIATIVE S.activite_verifiee: SOLTHIS — Therapeutic Solidarity and Health Initiatives, international-solidarity NGO founded by medical researchers, based in Paris. Sustainably strengthens healthcare systems in resource-poor countries (HIV, maternal health, infectious diseases).

ASSOCIATION GENERALE DES FAMILLES.activite_verifiee: AGF — General Family Association, Parisian network by arrondissement (AGF 6, 8, 16, 17-18, etc.), affiliated with Familles de France. Represents and defends family interests, offers cultural, artistic, sports and mutual-aid activities.

ASS GENERALE DES FAMILLES.activite_verifiee: AGF — General Family Association, Parisian network by arrondissement (AGF 6, 8, 16, 17-18, etc.), affiliated with Familles de France. Represents and defends family interests, offers cultural, artistic, sports and mutual-aid activities.

R G F DE PARIS ETS INTERDEPART.activite_verifiee: R.G.F de Paris — General Tax Management / Departmental training centre of the RGF, inter-departmental structure linked to land and tax management in Paris.

ASSOCIATION FONDATION ETUDIANTE POUR LA.activite_verifiee: AFEV — Student Foundation for the City Association, created in 1991. Network of student volunteers mobilising ~7,000 volunteers, 700 civic-service members and 600 solidarity flatmates in 40+ cities and 300 working-class neighbourhoods. Mentoring of young people in educational difficulty (2 hours/week per pair).

FONDATION ETUDIANTE POUR LA VIL.activite_verifiee: AFEV — Student Foundation for the City Association, created in 1991. Network of student volunteers mobilising ~7,000 volunteers, 700 civic-service members and 600 solidarity flatmates in 40+ cities and 300 working-class neighbourhoods. Mentoring of young people in educational difficulty (2 hours/week per pair).

ASSOCIATION DE LA FONDATION ETUDIANTE PO.activite_verifiee: AFEV — Student Foundation for the City Association, created in 1991. Network of student volunteers mobilising ~7,000 volunteers, 700 civic-service members and 600 solidarity flatmates in 40+ cities and 300 working-class neighbourhoods. Mentoring of young people in educational difficulty (2 hours/week per pair).

CENTRE SOCIAL ET CULTUREL SOLIDARITE ROQ.activite_verifiee: Solidarité Roquette social and cultural centre, association based since 1975 at 47 rue de la Roquette Paris 11th. Runs 4 structures: community centre, training centre, 25-cot crèche, shared garden. Social support, school support, French-as-foreign-language/literacy, IT, cooking, sewing workshops.

COLLECTIF CAFE CULTURE CUISINE.activite_verifiee: Collectif 4C — Coffee Culture Cooking Collective (SIREN 813550142), association created on 21 May 2015 by Goutte d'Or residents (Paris 18th). Runs Quartier Libre (9-11 rue de la Charbonnière Paris 18th since 2019, funded by the participatory budget): shared kitchen, community café-restaurant, resource space.

ASS TRANSITION NUMERIQUE EDUC.activite_verifiee: Digital Education Transition Association, Parisian structure dedicated to supporting schools and teachers in the educational digital transformation (limited public details).

CAPS.activite_verifiee: CAPS — Permanent Health Reception Centre / PASS at the Hôtel-Dieu (AP-HP), consultation unit dedicated to people in precarity without health coverage. Coordinated medical, nursing, social and dental care. Hôtel-Dieu, 1 parvis Notre-Dame Paris 4th.

SA HLM PIERRES ET LUMIERES.activite_verifiee: Pierres & Lumières (SAPEL, SIREN 672022084), HLM limited company founded in 1967. HQ 112 avenue Aristide Briand, Antony (92). Manages ~6,100 social housing units in Île-de-France and Loiret; subsidiary Pierres Avenir Construction (affordable home ownership). Member of the Habitat Réuni network.

PRIBON CRIMEE.activite_verifiee: Pri-Bon Crimée, association of the 19th arrondissement of Paris — likely linked to the sociocultural fabric around rue de Crimée (Espace 19, community centres). Limited public details.

WATIZAT.activite_verifiee: Watizat, association created in 2017 advocating for access to information for exiled people. Publishes a monthly multilingual guide (FR, EN, AR, Pashto, Dari) on asylum procedures: process, shelter, food distribution, health, French classes, access to law. Branches in Paris, Lyon, Toulouse, Oise.

SANTE DAVIEL ASD.activite_verifiee: ASD — Daviel Health Association (SIREN 891834459), 33 rue Boussingault Paris 13th. Coordination and care-supply support structure in the 13th: retention/establishment of healthcare professionals, Daviel multidisciplinary health centre (opened in November 2024).

FONDATION TERRE DE LIENS.activite_verifiee: Terre de Liens Foundation, foundation recognised as being of public utility. Sustainably preserves agricultural land and facilitates access for organic and small-scale farmers. ~122 farms acquired, ~3,000 ha protected from speculation through the national association, the Solidarity Property Company and the Foundation.

ENERCITIF.activite_verifiee: EnerCit'IF, Parisian citizen solar cooperative created in 2018 (association in 2016). Installs and operates photovoltaic plants on public Paris rooftops (schools, middle schools, gymnasiums). City of Paris concession contract for 12 plants (~750 kWp, ~4,000 m²). Governance: 1 person = 1 vote.

ONZIEME EVENEMENTS FESTIVAL ONZE BOUGE.activite_verifiee: Onze Bouge Festival — run by À Suivre association, street-arts festival of the 11th arrondissement of Paris since 1997. 4 days at the end of May: free theatre, circus, dance, music and visual arts in the streets, squares and gardens of the 11th.

ASSOCIATION LES PETITS RIENS.activite_verifiee: Les Petits Riens association (Paris), people's school of the arts and solidarity reuse centre. Opens artistic practice to young people from working-class neighbourhoods; collects and resells used clothes and books with professional-inclusion teams.

SPLA PARIS BATIGNOLLES AMENAGEMENT.activite_verifiee: SPL Paris Batignolles Aménagement — today Paris & Métropole Aménagement (P&Ma, SIREN 522085760), local public company created in 2010 by the City of Paris for the Clichy-Batignolles ZAC (Paris 17th). Scope expanded in 2015 to all of Paris. Runs 6 operations (Chapelle Charbon, Paul Meurice, Porte Pouchet, Saint-Vincent-de-Paul, Clichy-Batignolles, Gare des Mines-Fillettes / Arena).

ASSOCIATION DE SOUTIEN A FOND.activite_verifiee: Association supporting an endowment fund (Parisian structuring fund supporting culture, sport or education, similar to the City of Paris endowment fund / Ateliers de Paris). Specific details limited depending on the exact name.

ASS PREVENTION ACCUEIL SOUTIEN ORIE.activite_verifiee: APASO — Association for Prevention, Reception, Support and Orientation, created in 1989. 6 rue Auguste Caïn Paris 14th. Three areas: inclusion, parenting support, access to law; socio-judicial activities. Active in Île-de-France (Essonne and Paris).

ASS PREVENTION ACCUEIL SOUTIEN ET O.activite_verifiee: APASO — Association for Prevention, Reception, Support and Orientation, created in 1989. 6 rue Auguste Caïn Paris 14th. Three areas: inclusion, parenting support, access to law; socio-judicial activities. Active in Île-de-France (Essonne and Paris).

ASSOCIATION PREVENTION ACCUEIL SOUTIEN E.activite_verifiee: APASO — Association for Prevention, Reception, Support and Orientation, created in 1989. 6 rue Auguste Caïn Paris 14th. Three areas: inclusion, parenting support, access to law; socio-judicial activities. Active in Île-de-France (Essonne and Paris).

PAUSE DU 6EME.activite_verifiee: La Pause du 6e, humanitarian association 21 rue du Montparnasse Paris 6th. Runs a solidarity luggage room for homeless people (secure storage of their belongings) with morning and evening drop-in sessions staffed by volunteers.

L UN EST L AUTRE.activite_verifiee: L'Un est l'Autre, 1901-act association created in 2003, Paris 14th. Prepares and distributes 2,400 hot meals per week to homeless people or those in extreme precarity (Thursday evening, Saturday and Sunday lunch). ~350 volunteers, home visits to elderly people, food parcels, emergency shelter.

UN TOIT POUR TOI.activite_verifiee: Un Toit pour Toi, association 4 rue Esclangon Paris 18th. Rental intermediation approved by the Île-de-France prefecture (subletting to families in emergency, ~10 housing units). Postal address-registration for people without stable housing (~4,200 registered). Supports DALO appeals.

VILLETTE SERVICE PLUS.activite_verifiee: Villette Service Plus / Villette Emploi — structures of the APSV group (La Villette Site Prevention Association, created 1986). Intermediate association and ETTI, services company for the lasting professional inclusion of young people in precarity in north-east Paris. Also runs the Oeco project (waste reduction, reuse, bike repair).

ERNEST CIRCUITCOURT RESTAURATION.activite_verifiee: Ernest — Short-Circuit Solidarity, association created in 2015. Prepares 500 meals and 130 organic local baskets each week for people in food insecurity, + 700 volunteer-prepared meals for homeless people. 'pourmanger' scheme (solidarity supplement in 15 partner restaurants). Chez Ernest restaurant impasse Joinville Paris 19th since 2023.

ASSOCIATION AU RENDEZ VOUS BOUT CHOU.activite_verifiee: Au Rendez-vous des Bout'Chou community drop-in nursery, 52 rue de l'Amiral Roussin Paris 15th. City of Paris and CAF approval (rates by income). Receives 15 children from age 1 until kindergarten entry, open Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm. Multilingual team (FR, EN, NL).

ASS AU RENDEZ VOUS BOUT CHOU.activite_verifiee: Au Rendez-vous des Bout'Chou community drop-in nursery, 52 rue de l'Amiral Roussin Paris 15th. City of Paris and CAF approval (rates by income). Receives 15 children from age 1 until kindergarten entry, open Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm. Multilingual team (FR, EN, NL).

REPARESEB.activite_verifiee: RépareSeb, social joint venture created by the SEB Group and the Ares Group in partnership with the City of Paris. First Parisian collaborative repair centre for SEB small appliances: under-warranty and out-of-warranty repairs, resale of refurbished appliances (-50%), professional inclusion of about 25 staff.

ORCHESTRE COLONNE.activite_verifiee: Orchestre Colonne — Concerts Colonne Artistic Association, founded in 1873 by Édouard Colonne. One of the oldest Parisian orchestras still active. Association and SCOP structure bringing together ~80-100 professional musicians. 5,000+ symphony concerts given in Paris, mission to support young artists.

L ARAIGNEE GENTILLE.activite_verifiee: L'Araignée Gentille (SIREN 328542162), approved association/drop-in nursery, 6 square Ornano Paris 18th. Receives children aged 10 months to 5 years; play and language activities to support development and learning collective life.

GRAINS DE SEL.activite_verifiee: Grains de Sel Parisian association — early-childhood structure (parental crèche) or food cooperative depending on exact name. In Paris, identified reference: Les Amis des Grains de Sel, 41 rue Barrault Paris 13th (consumer cooperative SCIC).

ASSOCIATION AMBROISE CROIZAT.activite_verifiee: Ambroise Croizat Association (SIREN 300512647), 4 rue Lasson Paris 12th. 1901-act training and social-action: adaptation, inclusion and reintegration of people with disabilities or vulnerabilities. Runs two ESRPs (Louis Gatignon in Cher, Masson-Timbaud in Île-de-France); vocational training + French as foreign language.

ASS NAL PREVENTION ALCOOL ADDICTOLO.activite_verifiee: ANPAA — today Association Addictions France, 1901-act association recognised as being of public utility, founded in 1872 by Claude Bernard and Louis Pasteur. HQ 20 rue Saint-Fiacre Paris 2nd. 89 departmental committees and 19 regional committees: prevention and care in alcohol and addiction (CSAPA, CAARUD), training, advocacy.

FABRIQUE NOMADE.activite_verifiee: La Fabrique Nomade, association founded in January 2016 by Inès Mesmar. 1 bis avenue Daumesnil Paris 12th (Viaduc des Arts). Promotes and supports the professional inclusion of migrant and refugee artisans: 6-month programme (French as foreign language + collaboration with designers, production of objects sold for €70-200). Inclusion rate ~76%. Supported by LVMH group.

ASSOCIATION ESPACE.activite_verifiee: Espace association — Parisian community structure (specific details limited depending on exact name, potentially Espace Dakar, Espace 19, Espace Torcy, etc.).

YOLO CONSEIL COACHING.activite_verifiee: YOLO Conseil & Coaching, Qualiopi-certified training and coaching body, 10 place des Martyrs Clichy (92). Supports young people, women and adults towards orientation, professional reconversion and starting new positions. Short courses (e.g. Career Search in 4 days).

ASSOCIATION POUR INSERTION DES JEUNES.activite_verifiee: AIJ — Inter-professional Association for the Inclusion of Young People / AFIJ-type, Parisian structure supporting social and professional inclusion of young people (16-25).

PIROUETT.activite_verifiee: Pirouett' — community parental crèche, 147 bd Auguste Blanqui Paris 13th. 16 children aged 10 months to 3 years, 7 qualified staff, pedagogy inspired by Loczy, garden, organic meals cooked on site. PMI-approved, grant-funded by the City of Paris.

ACORE.activite_verifiee: ACORE, 1901-act association created on 29 September 1985, 19 bd des Italiens Paris 2nd. Partner of the City of Paris for the reconversion of Parisian audiences; services adapted to people with disabilities. ACORE Human Resources branch.

ACTION ET TRANSITION.activite_verifiee: Action et Transition, Parisian inclusion-and/or-professional-transition support association. Limited public details.

FONDATION LOUIS LEPINE.activite_verifiee: Fondation Louis Lépine, foundation created in 1950 to support the staff of the Paris Police Prefecture and their families. 4 missions: solidarity, housing, leisure, orphan grants. Collaborates with the Œuvre des Orphelins de la Préfecture de police (created in 1901, RUP 1906).

REZ DE RAIL.activite_verifiee: Rez de Rail (SIREN 917724387), SCIC SA created on 02/08/2022, 105 rue Curial Paris 19th. Operates a hybrid venue on the Petite Ceinture (café-bar-restaurant) around sustainable food, popular education, culture, circular economy and ecology. Partners: Bellevilles, IFA Paris, Mam'Ayoka.

YOTI PARIS.activite_verifiee: YOTI Paris, Parisian community structure for elderly support and/or intergenerational solidarity. Limited public details.

CENTRE GAI ET LESBIEN.activite_verifiee: Paris and Île-de-France LGBTQI+ Centre (formerly Centre Gai et Lesbien — CGL, created 1993; formerly Maison des Homosexualités, 1989). SIREN 393943170, HQ Paris 3rd. Reception, listening, legal/psy/employment/health drop-in services for LGBTQI+ people. Federates 109 member associations.

ASSOCIATION LE GARAGE NUMERIQUE.activite_verifiee: Le Garage Numérique, association of the 20th arrondissement (Ménilmontant) founded in 2011. Digital inclusion and popular education: PC refurbishing under free software, workshops, training of young IT technicians (including Passe Numérique Pro in partnership with CNAM). 2019 Google Impact Challenge France winner.

FEDERATION DE LA LIGUE DE L ENSEIGNEMENT.activite_verifiee: Paris Federation of the Ligue de l'enseignement (FOL 75), departmental Parisian representation. 167 bd de la Villette Paris 10th. Popular-education movement founded in 1866 by Jean Macé; education, culture, solidarity and civic engagement. ~2M indirect members in France.

ASSOC MOSAIQUE L ATELIER DES ENFANT.activite_verifiee: Mosaïque l'Atelier des Enfants, community multi-care crèche, 21 rue de la Folie-Méricourt Paris 11th. Receives children aged 1 to 3 and their families, a place of life and openness. (Historic president André Navel 1993-2019.)

GIP POUR LA REUSSITE EDUCATIVE A PA.activite_verifiee: GIP REP — Public Interest Group for Educational Success in Paris, created on 13 July 2006 between the State, the City and the Department of Paris (joined by CAF Paris in 2007). Runs the Educational Success Programme (PRE) in the 11 priority Parisian territories: individual educational, social, cultural and health support for children aged 2 to 16.

CAISSE FEDERALE DE CREDIT MUTUEL.activite_verifiee: Caisse Fédérale de Crédit Mutuel (CFCM), banking cooperative society. Coordination and shared services of the Crédit Mutuel network, central organisation in Paris (Confédération Nationale du Crédit Mutuel, 1958 law). Historic HQ in Strasbourg.

GROUPE SEB FRANCE.activite_verifiee: Groupe SEB France, French subsidiary of the SEB group (listed limited company, founded in 1857). World leader in small household appliances (Tefal, Moulinex, Rowenta, Krups, SEB, etc.). Global HQ 112 Chemin du Moulin Carron, Écully (69); ~32,000 staff, present in ~150 countries.

ASSOCIATION CRECHE GAN ESTHER.activite_verifiee: Crèche Gan Esther Association, Jewish community crèche, 14 rue de Thionville Paris 19th. Receives infants as part of the Consistoire / Parisian Jewish community network of crèches and gans.

CRECHE GAN ESTHER.activite_verifiee: Crèche Gan Esther Association, Jewish community crèche, 14 rue de Thionville Paris 19th. Receives infants as part of the Consistoire / Parisian Jewish community network of crèches and gans.

HAWA AU FEMININ.activite_verifiee: H.A.W.A au féminin (SIREN 883585184), pioneering inclusion workshop in circular and solidarity fashion, founded by Hawa Sangaré. Now based at Manufacture Berlier Paris 13th (after the 18th). Supports women far from employment (80% of the workforce): sewing using upcycled fabrics from major fashion houses. Double City of Paris SSE Trophy.

JUDO AMICALE PARIS XX.activite_verifiee: AJA Paris 20e — Friendly Judo Association Paris XX, club founded in 2003 by Alexandre Borderieux (1992 French champion). 59 rue Saint-Blaise Paris 20th (Orteaux gymnasium). ~300 members, recreational and competitive practice, 52 national medals since 2008.

ASSOCIATION JUDO AMICALE PARIS XX.activite_verifiee: AJA Paris 20e — Friendly Judo Association Paris XX, club founded in 2003 by Alexandre Borderieux (1992 French champion). 59 rue Saint-Blaise Paris 20th (Orteaux gymnasium). ~300 members, recreational and competitive practice, 52 national medals since 2008.

ASSOCIATION PSYCHOFORM.activite_verifiee: Psychoform Association, Parisian structure for training in psychoanalysis or psychotherapeutic education (limited public details).

EOS IMAGING.activite_verifiee: EOS Imaging (SIREN 349694893), French medical-imaging group (formerly Biospace Med, founded in 1989). HQ Paris 9th. Designs and markets the EOS system (low-dose full-body radiographs in functional position). Subsidiaries: Besançon, Cambridge (USA), Montreal, Frankfurt, Singapore. Acquired in 2021 by AlphaTec (USA).

DEMOCRATIE ET ENTRAIDE EN SYRIE.activite_verifiee: Democracy and Solidarity in Syria — Ghosn Zeitoun (SIREN 789432481), 1901-act association created on 11 September 2012 by academics and researchers. 85 bd Malesherbes Paris 8th. Grants and French-as-foreign-language support for Syrian and Syro-Palestinian refugee students (partnerships with the City of Paris, France Terre d'Asile, CPU).

ASSOCIATION TECHNO PLUS.activite_verifiee: Techno+, community health association of the rave/freeparty movement created on 1 June 1995, 105 avenue de la République Paris 11th. Intervention at techno events: chill-out, distribution of harm-reduction equipment (drugs, sound, sexual), information and prevention.

POSITIVE PLANET.activite_verifiee: Positive Planet (formerly PlaNet Finance), international anti-poverty NGO created in 1998 by Jacques Attali (foundation president) and Arnaud Ventura. Microfinance, technical support, socio-economic inclusion. Positive Planet France (created in 2006) fights unemployment in priority neighbourhoods.

MUSIQUES ET CULTURES DIGITALES.activite_verifiee: Musiques & Cultures Digitales (MCD), bilingual association and magazine dedicated to digital arts and electronic music (ISSN 1638-3400). 8 rue du Général Renault Paris 11th. Member of the Digital Arts Network (RAN).

ASSOCIATION MEDIATION USAGE OPTIMAL NUIT.activite_verifiee: AMUON — Mediation Association for Optimal Use of the Night, founded in 2011 by the MAP network (Paris Contemporary Music) and the union chamber of artistic cabarets and discos. Notably runs Les Pierrots de la Nuit (artistic mediators working in Paris's festive neighbourhoods), training centre, Nightbreak.

ASS MEDIATION USAGE OPTIMAL NUIT.activite_verifiee: AMUON — Mediation Association for Optimal Use of the Night, founded in 2011 by the MAP network (Paris Contemporary Music) and the union chamber of artistic cabarets and discos. Notably runs Les Pierrots de la Nuit (artistic mediators working in Paris's festive neighbourhoods), training centre, Nightbreak.

MOULINOT COMPOST BIOGAZ.activite_verifiee: Moulinot Compost & Biogaz (SIREN 798298899), SSE/ESUS company created in 2013 by Stephan Martinez in Paris. Collection and recovery of food waste (restaurants, canteens) into compost and biogas. Logistics/pretreatment platform in Stains (93) — 40,000 tonnes/year. Professional inclusion of staff.

WIMOOV.activite_verifiee: Wimoov (formerly Voiture & Co, 1998), association of Groupe SOS, specialist in inclusive and sustainable mobility. Supports ~31,000 inclusion participants/year (young people, seniors, disabled people) through mobility assessment, transport solutions, carpooling, social driving school. 250+ staff, 1,000 partners.

MAKE ICI.activite_verifiee: Make ICI, the leading French network of collaborative manufacturing facilities for craftspeople, designers, makers and Made-in-France entrepreneurs. Led by Christine and Nicolas Bard. 10 sites in France (including Make ICI Vitry-sur-Seine since 2024, ICI Montreuil since 2012); 12,500 m² of shared workshops, 500 residents. ESUS, 2020 Liliane Bettencourt Prize winner.

PARIS SAINT GERMAIN HANDBALL.activite_verifiee: Paris Saint-Germain Handball, men's professional handball club founded in 1941, handball department of Paris Saint-Germain FC. Based at the Pierre-de-Coubertin stadium Paris 16th (4,016 seats). Bought by Qatar Sports Investments (QSI) in 2012. 12 LNH Division 1 titles.

ASS PARIS TOUT P TITS.activite_verifiee: Paris Tout P'tits, association created in 1992, exclusively volunteer-run. Provides destitute Parisian families with infant-formula baskets, baby food and nappies for babies under 18 months (12 weeks max/child) on referral by social services. 2 distribution centres (Hermite Paris 18th, Didot Paris 14th).

ASSOCIATION PARIS TOUT P TITS.activite_verifiee: Paris Tout P'tits, association created in 1992, exclusively volunteer-run. Provides destitute Parisian families with infant-formula baskets, baby food and nappies for babies under 18 months (12 weeks max/child) on referral by social services. 2 distribution centres (Hermite Paris 18th, Didot Paris 14th).

THE C40 CITIES CLIMATE LEADERSHIP.activite_verifiee: C40 Cities Climate Leadership Group, network of ~96 major cities worldwide (1/12 of global population) founded in 2005 by Ken Livingstone. Urban climate action: greenhouse-gas reduction, adaptation, air quality, green jobs. Anne Hidalgo was the first female president (2016). Paris is a member.

ACCORDS CROISES.activite_verifiee: Accords Croisés, concert agency, production house and label, 32 rue Myrha Paris 18th. Specialised in world music, collaborates with international voices and produces transcultural works (CD/DVD with documented booklets).

ASSOCIATION MISSION ENFANCE.activite_verifiee: Mission Enfance, international solidarity NGO created in 1991 in France and the Principality of Monaco by Father Stéphane Aumonier. Under the honorary presidency of Prince Albert II of Monaco. Helps with the education of children in distress worldwide. Paris office: 33 rue Galilée Paris 16th.

INCUBATEUR AU FEMININ.activite_verifiee: WILLA (formerly Paris Pionnières, SIREN 452740285), Parisian start-up incubator created in 2005, dedicated to companies with at least one woman in leadership. Sentier, Paris 2nd. 150+ experts, 450 active alumni. ~500 women supported in 2023. Fights for diversity in tech.

42.activite_verifiee: 42, free, open and prerequisite-free IT school, founded in 2013 in Paris by Xavier Niel (Iliad-Free), Nicolas Sadirac, Kwame Yamgnane, Florian Bucher. 96 bd Bessières Paris 17th. Project-based, peer-learning pedagogy, no teachers. 15,000+ students across 42 campuses (25 countries).

COMITE D ORGAN FRANCE TIR A L ARC.activite_verifiee: France Archery Organising Committee, association created on 24 June 2020 by the FFTA, the Île-de-France regional committee, the Paris departmental committee, the CNOSF, the City of Paris and the Île-de-France Region. Organises the Hyundai Archery World Cup and the Olympic Qualification Tournament in Paris (2021-2023) as part of Paris 2024.

BANANE.activite_verifiee: Banane Association / Les Mamans de la Banane, created in 2021 by Khady Mané. Fights brawls between teenagers and supports young people from working-class neighbourhoods (Amandiers, Ménilmontant) facing drugs and homelessness. Organises Clean Challenge and citizen actions.

FONDATION PARTAGE ET VIE.activite_verifiee: Fondation Partage et Vie (formerly Fondation Caisses d'Épargne pour la Solidarité, SIREN 920028560), recognised as being of public utility. Runs 136 facilities in 12 metropolitan regions + Martinique, Guadeloupe (46 départements) including 86 EHPADs. Fights social exclusion related to age, illness or disability.

SOCIETE PUBLIQUE LOCALE LE CARREAU DU TE.activite_verifiee: SPL Le Carreau du Temple, local public company 100% owned by the City of Paris (decided in 2008, opened 2014). Manages the hybrid culture-sport-event facility of the Carreau du Temple covered market (Paris 3rd, 4,000 m², 250-seat auditorium, 1,800 m² modular space). Artistic programming, sports associations, events.

HAUT COMME 3 POMMES.activite_verifiee: Haut Comme 3 Pommes (SIREN 328169339), Parisian community association and drop-in nursery, 42 bis rue Sedaine Paris 11th. Reception of infants; CAF and City of Paris approved (rate based on CNAF scale).

ESPERO.activite_verifiee: Espero, Parisian school-support / educational association — limited detailed public information depending on exact name.

WEBFORCE3 PARIS.activite_verifiee: Webforce3 Paris, inclusive digital school founded in 2014 by Alain Assouline. Short courses (3-12 months) in web development, web design/digital marketing and systems & networks, accessible without diploma requirements. Two centres in Paris (4th and 18th). ~50 schools in France and abroad.

ASSISTANCE PUBLIQUE DES HOPITAUX DE PARI.activite_verifiee: AP-HP — Public Assistance-Hospitals of Paris, university hospital centre of Île-de-France (~38 hospitals, ~100,000 staff). Largest CHU in Europe. HQ 3 avenue Victoria Paris 4th.

SANTE MENTALE LUTTE CONTRE.activite_verifiee: Structure active in mental health and/or suicide prevention (SMFLCE / CPS Paris / SOS Amitié / UNPS). In Paris, Suicide Prevention Centre (run by Fondation Élan Retrouvé): crisis reception and psychological support; UNPS federates ~40 structures.

ILE AUX LANGUE.activite_verifiee: L'île aux langues, 1901-act association created in 2011, training body specialised in French as a foreign language. 21 rue Émile Duployé Paris 18th (Goutte d'Or neighbourhood). French teaching (literacy, general FLE, professional French, sociolinguistic workshops) for ~350 learners/year.

LOGEMENT GEST IMMOBILIERE REG PARIS.activite_verifiee: RIVP — Régie Immobilière de la Ville de Paris, mixed-economy company created in 1923. Capital: City of Paris (79%), Caisse des Dépôts (10%), Habitat en Région Group (10%). One of the 3 main Parisian social-housing operators (>80% of the Parisian social stock with Paris Habitat and Elogie-Siemp). Also builds crèches, schools, public facilities.

OBSERV MOND VILLES SUR QUAL AIR GUA.activite_verifiee: GUAPO — Global Urban Air Pollution Observatory, observatory launched by the City of Paris, the Greater Paris Metropolis and the WHO (with C40 and 100 Resilient Cities support). Federates global major cities on air quality: knowledge sharing, measurements and health impacts.

CAPSKILLS.activite_verifiee: CAPSKILLS (SIREN 852854181), Parisian association (Paris 16th) active since 2019, created by the chairman of the NAXIS Group. Adult-training body: qualifying, certifying, apprenticeship, professional. Implements the Paris Tous En Jeux (PTEJ) pre-qualifying programme in priority neighbourhoods, linked to the 2024 Olympics.

MINI COCCINELLES.activite_verifiee: Mini Coccinelles association, community collective crèche, 29-31 rue Robert et Sonia Delaunay Paris 11th. Receives children aged 2.5 months to 3 years on a full or part-time basis (including children with disabilities). Multidisciplinary team (early-childhood educators, paediatric nursing aides, early-childhood CAP).

MSP QUAI DE SEINE.activite_verifiee: Quai de Seine Multidisciplinary Health Centre (MSP), 11 passage de Flandres / 52 av. de Flandre Paris 19th (opposite the Ourcq canal). 9 specialties, 255 m². Team: 3 GPs, midwife, physiotherapist, osteopath, 2 nurses, psychologist, dietitian.

MEDICALE BELLEVILLE.activite_verifiee: Belleville medical centre — Group of Belleville Social Works (GOSB), RUP association since 1922, 162 rue de Belleville Paris 20th. Runs 8 health/medico-social/early-childhood facilities. General health centre in sector 1 (general/specialist medicine, dental, paramedical).

SOCIAL BUILDER.activite_verifiee: Social Builder, association created in 2011. Orients, trains and reconverts women towards digital professions. ~75,000 women supported over 11 years; Women In Digital programme (440 women trained in Île-de-France). Labelled Paris Code, Grande École du Numérique, La France s'engage winner.

ASSOCIATION LE MOULIN.activite_verifiee: Le Moulin Association, neighbourhood house at the Moulin de la Vierge (Paris 14th). 23 bis rue du Moulin de la Vierge. Social and cultural mediation, family reception, school support, parenting support, access to law, digital inclusion, French as foreign language.

AMIS DE FARINEZVOUS.activite_verifiee: Les Amis de Farinez'vous, support association for Farinez'vous — artisanal, sustainable and solidarity SCIC bakery created in 2008 by Domitille Flichy. Professional inclusion in baking trades (sales and production). Bakeries: 9 bis rue Villiot Paris 12th, 19 rue du Château des Rentiers Paris 13th, inclusive school rue Clisson.

UNIVERSITE PARIS 1 PANTHEON SORBONN.activite_verifiee: Université Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne, Parisian public university born of the Sorbonne reform of 1971. 14 UFRs, ~45,000 students, specialised in law, economics-management, humanities and arts. Main campus: 12 place du Panthéon Paris 5th.

RESEAU TREIZE.activite_verifiee: Réseau du 13e / Réseau Treize, community ecosystem for inclusion and employment in the 13th arrondissement (13 Avenir, SNC Paris 13th, RJD 13, 13 Pour Tous). Exact details depending on legal name.

NOVIGERE SOCIETE ANONYME.activite_verifiee: Novigère — HLM limited company (SIREN 558200507), created on 27 March 1974. HQ 141 avenue de Clichy Paris 17th. HLM subsidiary of CILGERE (1% housing collector). Social-housing rentals in Île-de-France. Inactive since June 2018.

LULU DANS MA RUE.activite_verifiee: Lulu dans ma rue — association created in 2014 by Charles-Édouard Vincent. Solidarity neighbourhood concierge: local services (DIY, cleaning, deliveries, sewing, childcare) by self-employed 'Lulus' paid €12-30/h, with support and training. First kiosk rue Saint-Paul Paris 4th (May 2015), ~1,000 active Lulus.

BELLEVILLE ASSOCIATION.activite_verifiee: La Maison du Bas Belleville (CRESCENDO group / Groupe SOS), social and cultural centre 5 bd de Tourtille Paris 20th. Reception, access to rights, family-leisure hub, childhood-youth, school support, cultural programming. At the intersection of the 10th, 11th, 19th and 20th.

SOCIETE DE PRODUCTION AG.activite_verifiee: Société de Production AG (formerly Cirque à l'Ancienne, SIREN 319556494), live-performance production SARL. 55 avenue Marceau Paris 16th since September 2022. Activity extended to music publishing in 2024.

NEAG 3.activite_verifiee: NEAG 3 (SIREN 848957387), Parisian company (Paris 19th) created in 2019, specialised food retail (managed by Charles André Jean-Marie Lottmann). Possibly running the Nous Anti-Gaspi project.

STUDYSPACE.activite_verifiee: StudySpace, Parisian school-support / study-space association (limited detailed public information).

MEDIATIONINSERTIONFORMATION.activite_verifiee: Médiation Insertion Formation (SIREN 524674280), inclusion-through-economic-activity association, 4 rue des Fougères Paris 20th (HQ 33 rue Boucry Paris 18th). Inclusion workshop in building finishing trades (plaster, paint, tiling, mosaics) for social-housing operators (Paris Habitat). French as foreign language and literacy.

POUR DEVELOPPEMENT SANTE FEMMES.activite_verifiee: ADSF — Acting for Women's Health (created in 2001, Paris 18th). Improves access to care for women in extreme exclusion (homeless, victims of violence, trafficking). 18 rue Bernard Dimey Paris 18th. Street rounds, day centres in Paris and Lille.

PORTE ENTR OUVERTE.activite_verifiee: La Porte Entr'Ouverte, community early-childhood facility in Paris 14th, CAF-approved since 1981 (created 1978). Drop-in nursery / family space, parenting support.

IDEES HEUREUSES.activite_verifiee: Les Idées Heureuses, 1901-act association created in 1987 (baroque) then relaunched by violinist Julien Chauvin. HQ 7 rue Rameau Paris 2nd. Runs two period-instrument ensembles: Le Concert de la Loge (olympique) and the Cambini-Paris Quartet. Concert production/distribution, baroque to 20th-century repertoire.

FOOTBALL CLUB DES GOBELINS.activite_verifiee: FC Gobelins Paris 13 — today Paris 13 Atletico, football club founded in 1968 at 3 avenue Joseph Bédier Paris 13th. ~40 teams (Football School U6-U13, seniors, women's, recreational). PSG training partner club since 2001. FFF Jeunes Élite label (2021).

REFER RESEAU FRANCILIEN DU REEMPLOI.activite_verifiee: REFER — Île-de-France Reuse Network, 1901-act association created in 2014. Federates 74 active members of solidarity reuse in Île-de-France (reuse centres, recycle centres, bike workshops, Emmaüs) around ~150 solidarity shops. Observatory, advocacy, support for local authorities and project leaders.

GROUP RECHER REALISAT DEVELOP RURAL.activite_verifiee: GRDR — Research and Achievement Group for Rural Development (Migration, Citizenship, Development), apolitical and non-confessional 1901-act association created in 1969. HQ 66 rue Marceau, Montreuil (93). Supports international-solidarity initiatives in West Africa (Mali, Mauritania, Senegal, Guinea-Bissau) and France.

MOTEUR.activite_verifiee: Moteur ! Association, created by Caroline Sénéclauze. Annual national competition (14-22 years) in partnership with the CNC. Image education and diversity: distribution of short films giving voice to young people on territorial, cultural and social diversity. Partnership with the Ministry of National Education (middle/high schools image option) and the Cannes Festival.

DOMREMY BASKET 13.activite_verifiee: La Domrémy Basket 13 (LDB13), basketball club Paris 13th, Maison des Associations 11 rue Caillaux. 29 mixed/youth/senior teams, plays in Île-de-France Regional. Renamed in 2005 to assert its rooting in the arrondissement.

PARADOXES.activite_verifiee: Paradoxes Association (Paris) — several entities with the same name: Compagnie Paradoxe(s) (contemporary theatre, DRAC-funded); Paradox Paris 11th (cultural and leisure centre 4 rue Neuve-Popincourt); parADoxes Paris (mental-health venue for 11-25 at 212 rue Saint-Maur Paris 10th); Association PARADOXES (1901-act, 2001, brief systemic therapy). Precise identification depends on the file.

BRICOLETTE.activite_verifiee: La Bricolette, Parisian ecological and solidarity association; future reuse centre of the 10th arrondissement. Mobile reuse facility (touring Île-de-France neighbourhoods), weekly reuse activity at the Magenta emergency-shelter centre (Gare de l'Est). Repair workshops / reuse awareness.

GROUPE SOS JEUNESSE.activite_verifiee: Groupe SOS Jeunesse, child-protection and youth branch of Groupe SOS. Born in 2016 from the JCLT + Insertions & Alternatives merger. HQ 102 rue Amelot Paris 11th. 27 MECS (children's social homes), 10 AEMOs, SAJE Paris 19th/20th, PARRAJ and maternity structures for ~90,000 young people/year.

POSITIVE.activite_verifiee: Positiv (formerly Positive Planet France), association created in 2006 by Jacques Attali. Fights unemployment in priority neighbourhoods (QPV) through free business-creation support. Active in 190 QPVs / 50 sites in 6 regions. ~47,000 people received, ~10,000 entrepreneurs supported. 4-6 month programme with collective workshops and individual coaching.

ASSOCIATION GESTION CENTRE ANIMATION CUL.activite_verifiee: AGECA — Cultural-Activities Centre Management Association, 177 rue de Charonne Paris 11th, created in 1974 to fill a gap in collective facilities in the neighbourhood. Sociocultural centre, historic hub of the Parisian immigrant association sector.

ASS GESTION CENTRE ANIMATION CULTUR.activite_verifiee: AGECA — Cultural-Activities Centre Management Association, 177 rue de Charonne Paris 11th, created in 1974 to fill a gap in collective facilities in the neighbourhood. Sociocultural centre, historic hub of the Parisian immigrant association sector.

UP.activite_verifiee: Mouvement UP (UP Conferences, UP Campus, UP Campus), Parisian movement dedicated to social innovation. Organises lectures, cafés, after-work events to bring together entrepreneurs and change-makers; weak-signals observatory and positive social network.

REUZ FRANCE.activite_verifiee: Reuz France, Parisian structure linked to circular economy and reuse centres (limited detailed public information depending on exact name).

CAFETE CAFE COLL PLACE DES FETES.activite_verifiee: Le Cafête — Place des Fêtes Collective Café, residents' association of the 19th arrondissement. HQ 239 rue de Belleville Paris 19th. Monthly mobile café, popular education, encounters between residents. Project funded by the Participatory Budget (€120,000).

ASSOCIATION FAMILLE CATHOLIQUE.activite_verifiee: AFC — Catholic Family Associations, federated in the CNAFC (recognised as being of public utility). 28 place Saint-Georges Paris 9th. ~30,000 member families, ~350 local AFCs, 74 departmental federations. Defence and promotion of the family, education workshops, family advocacy.

FAMILLE CATHOLIQUE.activite_verifiee: AFC — Catholic Family Associations, federated in the CNAFC (recognised as being of public utility). 28 place Saint-Georges Paris 9th. ~30,000 member families, ~350 local AFCs, 74 departmental federations. Defence and promotion of the family, education workshops, family advocacy.

ASSOCIATION POUR LA GESTION D ESPACES.activite_verifiee: Space Management Association — likely a Parisian structure managing community or social spaces (limited public details depending on name).

INNOVATION FACTORY.activite_verifiee: Innovation Factory, incubation/acceleration structure in Paris linked to the Web School Factory / Startup Innovation ecosystem (Cluster Paris Innovation network). Specific details limited depending on the targeted entity.

ASSOCIATION DES ORGANISATIONS SYNDICALES.activite_verifiee: ASO-BT — Association of Union Organisations of the Paris Bourse du Travail (SIREN 852183318), created on 19 April 2019, 3 rue du Château d'Eau Paris 10th. Ran the Bourse du Travail (CGT, CFDT, CFTC, CFE-CGC, FO, UNSA, SOLIDAIRES). Dissolved on 12 February 2024.

EPITECH ECOLE INFORMAT NOUV TECHNO.activite_verifiee: Epitech — School for IT and new technologies (created in 1999, IONIS group). Main campus in Le Kremlin-Bicêtre (94, at Porte d'Italie) + 12 campuses in France. Master's-level Grande École diploma in 5 years (RNCP 7), specialised bachelors (cybersecurity, AI, cloud), MSc/MBA. Project-based pedagogy, no lectures.

PARIS MUSIC.activite_verifiee: Paris Music — contemporary-music festival and/or structure in Paris. Context: run by the MAP Network (Paris Contemporary Music Network), created in 2006, ~81 member structures. Federates, represents and promotes networking among Parisian music actors.

ARES ASSOCIATION.activite_verifiee: ARES — Association for Economic and Social Reintegration, IAE group created in 1991. Largest IAE group in Île-de-France (~1,000 supported staff/year, 14 facilities, 4 sectors: logistics, circular economy, digital, construction). Ares Services Paris: CAP 18, 189 rue d'Aubervilliers Paris 18th.

INCUBATEUR PARIS BIOTECH.activite_verifiee: Paris Biotech Santé, healthcare incubator created in 2000 by the University of Paris, ESSEC, CentraleSupélec and INSERM. Paris Santé Cochin nursery (5,000 m², Cochin hospital Paris 14th since 2007): 53 companies and start-ups. Largest health incubator in Europe. 10-12 projects selected/year (medicines, medical devices, e-health, AI).

ASSOCIATION INCUBATEUR PARIS BIOTECH.activite_verifiee: Paris Biotech Santé, healthcare incubator created in 2000 by the University of Paris, ESSEC, CentraleSupélec and INSERM. Paris Santé Cochin nursery (5,000 m², Cochin hospital Paris 14th since 2007): 53 companies and start-ups. Largest health incubator in Europe. 10-12 projects selected/year (medicines, medical devices, e-health, AI).

ENVIE TRAPPES EN YVELINES.activite_verifiee: Envie — National Federation (created in 1984), network of 50 inclusion structures specialised in renovating electrical and electronic equipment (EEE). ~107,000 devices renovated/year, 2,200 inclusion FTE, 800 permanent contracts, collects 1/3 of French e-waste. Envie Trappes-en-Yvelines: Île-de-France regional branch.

FEDERATION ENVIE.activite_verifiee: Envie — National Federation (created in 1984), network of 50 inclusion structures specialised in renovating electrical and electronic equipment (EEE). ~107,000 devices renovated/year, 2,200 inclusion FTE, 800 permanent contracts, collects 1/3 of French e-waste. Envie Trappes-en-Yvelines: Île-de-France regional branch.

AYYEM ZAMEN.activite_verifiee: Ayyem Zamen ('The Good Old Days' in Arabic), association created in March 2003. Two social cafés for Parisians aged 60+: Café Social Belleville (Paris 20th, 2003) and Café Social Dejean (Paris 18th, 2008). Access to rights for elderly migrant workers, workshops, public scribes, + 'Domiciles Partagés' scheme (10 apartments) and mobile team.

ARCAL.activite_verifiee: Arcal — Workshop for Research and Creation in Lyric Art / National lyrical and musical theatre company (created in 1983, certified in 1999 by the Ministry of Culture). Directed by Catherine Kollen. Rehearsal studios Paris 20th. ~50 performances/season, throughout France, priority to young audiences. Jeune Scène Lyrique programme (since 2023).

RÉGIE DE QUARTIER DU 19EME.activite_verifiee: Régie de Quartier of the 19th, association and inclusion enterprise, 9 rue Colette Magny Paris 19th (Michelet/Alphonse Karr neighbourhood). Cleaning, green-space, waste-management, finishing-trades services, in partnership with the City, social-housing operators and residents. 55 inclusion staff supported.

ACTEURS DE LA REUSSITE EDUCATIVE.activite_verifiee: Anaré — National Association of Educational Success Actors, created in 2007. Federates Educational Success (PRE) professionals: teachers, social workers, medico-social workers. Organises national PRE days, training, resources.

APHP.activite_verifiee: AP-HP — Public Assistance-Hospitals of Paris, university hospital centre of Île-de-France (~38 public hospitals, ~100,000 staff). Largest CHU in Europe. HQ 3 avenue Victoria Paris 4th.

AS PERSONNELS APSAPVP.activite_verifiee: APSAP-VP (Association of Sports Staff of the Paris Administrations of the City of Paris), 1901-act multi-sport association founded in 1929, recognised as being of public utility in 1971. Over 25 sports activities for City of Paris and AP-HP staff, their families and Île-de-France residents.

UNE GOUTTE ORGANISATION PRODUCTION.activite_verifiee: UGOP — Une Goutte d'Organisation Productions, theatre / live-performance production company. 14 rue Édouard Robert Paris 12th.

SBC INSERTION.activite_verifiee: SBC Insertion (SIREN 519260558), ETTI SAS created in 2010, 13 bd de Courcelles Paris 8th (Paris 12th, Malakoff 92, Ivry 94 agencies). Recruits and supports people in socio-professional difficulty in temporary work in construction (structural work, finishing trades), public works, decontamination, waste sorting.

PLAISIR D ENFANCE.activite_verifiee: Plaisir d'Enfance (SIREN 378137400), cooperative group (SCOP since 2017) created in 1990. 56/60 rue du Pré Saint-Gervais Paris 19th. Leading French alternative-education group (Pikler pedagogy for early childhood, Montessori for school): 2 crèches (Le Nid des Tout-petits) + 1 kindergarten + 1 primary school.

STAGE ENTERTAINMENT FRANCE.activite_verifiee: Stage Entertainment France, French subsidiary (since 2005) of the international Stage Entertainment group. Main French musical-theatre producer, operator of the Théâtre Mogador (Paris 9th, ~1,600 seats) and the Casino de Paris. Productions: The Lion King, Aladdin, Moulin Rouge!, Chicago, TINA, Anastasia.

BOOLOFOOD SASU.activite_verifiee: BoolOfood SASU, SSE company (SIAE) in Paris near the Parc de la Villette and the Ourcq Canal Paris 19th. African restaurant / solidarity caterer: healthy fusion cuisine, 100% homemade, local and responsible (partnerships with AMAPs and women's cooperatives in Senegal). Inclusion of young people towards lasting employment.

ETAPE PARCOURS LOGE JEUNES.activite_verifiee: L'Étape — Young People Housing Pathway (SIREN 310580329), association running 3 Young Workers' Hostels (FJT) in Paris: L'Étape Voltaire (20 bd Voltaire Paris 11th), L'Étape Blanqui (48 bd Blanqui Paris 13th), L'Étape Masséna (15-19 rue Nicole-Reine Lepaute Paris 13th). 202 housing units for 232 places (16-25-year-old workers).

ASSOCIATION L ETAPE PARCOURS LOGE JEUNES.activite_verifiee: L'Étape — Young People Housing Pathway (SIREN 310580329), association running 3 Young Workers' Hostels (FJT) in Paris: L'Étape Voltaire (20 bd Voltaire Paris 11th), L'Étape Blanqui (48 bd Blanqui Paris 13th), L'Étape Masséna (15-19 rue Nicole-Reine Lepaute Paris 13th). 202 housing units for 232 places (16-25-year-old workers).

MSP VINCENT AURIOL.activite_verifiee: MSP Vincent Auriol, multidisciplinary health centre, 167 bd Vincent Auriol Paris 13th. SISA — general medicine and paediatrics consultations (Dr Arié Sarfati, Drs Valentine Remy and Karolina Noster).

SISA DES ENVIERGES.activite_verifiee: SISA des Envierges, Parisian Inter-Professional Outpatient Care Company. Likely linked to a multidisciplinary health centre in the 20th arrondissement (rue des Envierges / Belleville).

TATANE.activite_verifiee: Tatane (SIREN 752394460), association created in 2011 by Vikash Dhorasoo, Brieux Férot and Pierre Walfisz. 28 rue de l'Orillon Paris 11th. Popular movement for sustainable, joyful, inclusive and social football. Mobile, mixed, creative football school; Tatane workshops; think tank.

BOUFFESQUETAIRES.activite_verifiee: Les Bouffesquetaires (SIREN 534526389), SSE SAS, 69 rue Armand Carrel Paris 19th. Manufacturing and preparation of caterer dishes, bike delivery, catering and culinary pedagogy (food education and ecology focus).

ALLO MALTRAITANCE PERSONNES AGEES.activite_verifiee: ALMA Paris — Hello Mistreatment of Elderly People and/or Disabled Adults, Parisian association member of the 3977 Federation (created in 2014 from the merger of Alma-France and Habéo). Listening, advice and support for victims of mistreatment (elderly, disabled adults) and their families since 2003.
