ASSOCIATION LA CASERNE EPHEMERE.activite_verifiee: La Caserne Éphémère (SIREN 424477420), 1901-act association created on 1 August 1999, 24 rue Louis Blanc Paris 10th. Transforms vacant venues into eco-responsible cultural and artistic-practice centres. Operates Point Éphémère (200-206 quai de Valmy, opened in 2004) and La Caserne (fire station transformed into a sustainable-fashion incubator).

DESCODEUSES.activite_verifiee: DesCodeuses, association created in 2018 by Souad Boutegrabet, women's coding school in priority neighbourhoods. Belleville-Amandiers Paris 20th (+ Saint-Ouen-sur-Seine and Roubaix). 1-year vocational training (web dev, cybersecurity, applications) in cohorts of 15-20 women, free awareness workshops.

ASSOCIATION ARTISTIQUE CONCERT COLONNE.activite_verifiee: Orchestre Colonne — Concerts Colonne Artistic Association, founded in 1873 by Édouard Colonne, 94 rue de Miromesnil / 2 bd Berthier Paris 17th. SCOP; ~80-100 professional musicians. Oldest active Parisian community orchestra, 5,000+ symphony concerts.

ASSOCIATION DYNAMO.activite_verifiee: Dynamo Association, 3 passage Salarnier Paris 11th — humanitarian and mutual-aid association. Limited public details depending on exact name (homonyms in Troyes).

ACTI COLLTERR INIT SOCI SPOR CULT E.activite_verifiee: Local-Authority Actions for Social, Sports and Cultural Initiatives — financial scheme used by the City of Paris to allocate grants to authorities/structures running social, sports and cultural initiatives.

SOCIETE CIVILE DE MOYENS.activite_verifiee: Resource-Sharing Civil Company (SCM), structure pooling material and human resources between professionals (usually medical, legal or artistic) — generic name, details depending on exact entity.

ASSOCIATION GESTION LOCAL INTERASSOCIATI.activite_verifiee: Association managing a shared inter-association Parisian space (sharing of a venue between several associations).

COMITE DEPARTEMENTAL.activite_verifiee: Departmental committee (sports federation or institutional body) in Paris — specific details depending on the field (sport, Olympic, adapted sport).

ASSOCIATION DE MEDIATION POUR UN USAGE O.activite_verifiee: AMUON / Les Pierrots de la Nuit, artistic mediators working in Paris's festive neighbourhoods since 2011 (created by the MAP network and the CSCAD). Prevention of conflicts related to night-time noise, mediation between residents and venues, awareness actions.

MAGRO HUERTAS.activite_verifiee: Magro Huertas — Parisian structure (limited public details, possibly an SCI or SARL real-estate/commercial entity linked to the Magro and Huertas family names).

ENTR AIDE.activite_verifiee: Entr'Aide — Parisian popular-education association, 53 rue de l'Ourcq Paris 19th (SIREN 444154553). Activities to help homeless people and people in precarity, support towards reintegration.

DECK.activite_verifiee: Deck, Parisian association/structure (limited public details depending on exact name).

SCI MAKOVEC SCHLAPPI.activite_verifiee: SCI Makovec Schlappi, Parisian Real Estate Civil Company (Paris real-estate management vehicle).

CONSEIL DEPARTEMENT PARENTS D ELEVE.activite_verifiee: Parents' Departmental Council of Paris (CDPE) — Parisian federation of parents' associations (likely FCPE Paris or PEEP Paris), liaison between parents and academic authorities.

CONSEIL DEPARTEMENT PARENTS.activite_verifiee: Parents' Departmental Council of Paris (CDPE) — Parisian federation of parents' associations (likely FCPE Paris or PEEP Paris), liaison between parents and academic authorities.

CONSULTATION LIEU ACCUEIL PSYCH.activite_verifiee: CLAP — Consultation and Psychoanalytic Reception Venue, 1901-act association. Parent-child reception centres (children under 5) including 'Passage des Tout-Petits', 23 rue Rodier Paris 9th. Free consultations (up to 5 sessions) and discussion space for families with young children.

MARGUERITE.activite_verifiee: Marguerite Association in Paris — several entities with similar names (e.g. La Maison Marguerite-Marie of the diocese, MaMaMa Association co-founded by Marguerite for babies in precarity, Marguerite & Cie Association). Precise identification depends on grant context.

LIGUE FRCAISE DEFENSE DROITS DE L H.activite_verifiee: LDH — French League for the Defence of Human and Citizen Rights, founded on 4 June 1898 by Ludovic Trarieux (Dreyfus affair). National HQ 138 rue Marcadet Paris 18th. Defence of rights and freedoms (civil, political, social), fight against discrimination, 200+ local sections. RUP.

CITHEA FAMILLE ET PROFESSIONNEL.activite_verifiee: CIThéA Famille et Professionnel, association created on 12 September 2005 at the initiative of psychologists. Child-protection prevention and parenting support: ~60 collective actions across 4 départements (Paris, 91, 93, 94). Notably runs L'Atelier des Familles in the 15th (19 rue Rosenwald Paris 15th).

AGETA.activite_verifiee: AGETA — Association for the Management of Temporary Artistic Spaces (SIREN 533214722), active since 19 February 2011. 1 rue Frédérick Lemaître Paris 20th. Linked to the Curry Vavart collective, runs temporary artistic spaces (exhibitions, concerts, performances, workshops) for emerging artists.

UNION DEFENS SANTE MENTALE REG EST.activite_verifiee: UDSM — Union for the Defence of Mental Health in the Eastern Paris Region (SIREN 785705922), created in 1959 by Guy Rivière and Dr Henri Duchêne, RUP in 1972. HQ Champigny-sur-Marne (94). Runs 20 structures (prevention, diagnosis, care) in Val-de-Marne and Paris: CSAPA Meltem, CMP, etc. ~5,500 people supported, 350 staff.

EMMAUS CONNECT FONDATEUR ABBE PIERRE.activite_verifiee: Emmaüs Connect — Founder Abbé Pierre (SIREN 792272916), association created in 2013, linked to the Fondation Abbé Pierre and the Emmaüs movement. Fights social and digital exclusion through 3 pillars: equipment (devices at solidarity prices), connection (mobile plans) and training. 170,000+ people supported in France.

A CHACUN SES VACANCES.activite_verifiee: À Chacun Ses Vacances, Parisian association (Paris 20th) created in 2004. Adapted leisure and stays for children, adolescents and adults with intellectual disabilities or autism spectrum disorders. 16 social-tariff stays (~80 places) prioritising autistic children.

CAMILLIENNE SPORT 12.activite_verifiee: La Camillienne — LCS12 (Sports 12th, SIREN 392781340), cultural, artistic and sports association of the 12th arrondissement founded in 1894 by Father Delamaire (Bercy parish); became a 1901-act association in 1972. Multi-activity sports (capoeira, karate, judo, football, gym, swimming, yoga), culture and theatre.

FABRIQUE DE LA GOUTTE D OR.activite_verifiee: La Fabrique de la Goutte d'Or (SIREN 802639856), cooperative SCARL created in 2014. Brings together tailors and seamstresses of Goutte d'Or (Paris 18th, QPV). Made-in-Paris collection production for designers, haute-couture houses, brands and institutions. Dressed the airborne dancers of the 2024 Olympics.

CENTRE DE RESSOURCES POUR MINI.activite_verifiee: Resource Centre for Isolated Minors (CRMI) — Parisian structure supporting actors who help unaccompanied minors (MNA) and isolated foreign minors (MIE). Specific details depending on the referenced entity.

ACTIONS SOLIDARITE INTERNATIONALE.activite_verifiee: ASI — International Solidarity Actions, development NGO created in 1983, 14 bd de Douaumont Paris 17th. Health, economic development, agriculture; supports local initiatives in DRC, Burkina Faso, Mali, Côte d'Ivoire, Congo-Brazzaville, Gabon. Multidisciplinary approach (medical, psycho-social, educational, economic).

ASSOCIATION POLITIQUE CRIMINELLE APPLIQU.activite_verifiee: APCARS — Association for Applied Criminal Policy and Social Reintegration (SIREN 320734288), created on 3 October 1980 in Paris 9th. Socio-judicial association partner of the Justice system: rapid social investigations, alternatives to detention, victims. Mergers with ESTRAN (2009), SAJIR (2010), VERLAN (2011), SPES Marseille (2015).

400 COUPS.activite_verifiee: Les 400 Coups — Popular-education association, founded in 2015 by recreation leaders and arts/nature practitioners. Base: La Fourmilière, Monestier-de-Clermont (38). Organises summer stays and leisure centres for ages 4-17 with family-based pricing and a solidarity fund for children from working-class neighbourhoods (Grenoble, Paris).

FEDERATION FRANCAISE D ATHLETISME.activite_verifiee: FFA — French Athletics Federation (SIREN 784448730), 1901-act association founded in 1920, recognised as being of public utility. HQ 33 avenue Pierre-de-Coubertin Paris 13th since 1995. Delegated federation under the Ministry of Sports. ~315,000 members, organises the French Athletics Championships.

ANIMA FAC.activite_verifiee: Animafac, national network of student associations, created in 1996. HQ 153-155 avenue Jean Lolive, Pantin (93). Supports ~12,000 student associations (resources, training, practical guides, awareness campaigns). Mission to recognise student commitment, resources for solidarity-project leaders.

ESPOIR 18.activite_verifiee: Espoir 18, 1901-act association created on 16 September 2002 by 6 social actors of the La Chapelle neighbourhood (Paris 18th). Inclusion and socialisation of 13-30-year-olds from working-class neighbourhoods of the 18th through education, art, culture, sport, professional inclusion. Runs 6 Centres Paris Jeunes (Goutte d'Or, La Chapelle, Aubervilliers-Chapelle, Simplon-Clignancourt, Mont-Cenis). ~2,000 users.

GRENADINE ET MENTHE A L EAU.activite_verifiee: Grenadine et Menthe à l'eau parental crèche (SIREN 333976439), Parisian association created 39 years ago, 9 rue du Docteur Potain Paris 19th (Télégraphe). Small structure; pedagogical project around quality of reception, organic cooking prepared on site, ecological awareness.

JETUIL.activite_verifiee: je.tu.il… — association created in 1981, 18 rue de Saussure Paris 17th. Designs, produces and distributes audiovisual programmes for prevention and youth education (emotional, sexual, civic responsibility); prevention of violence and risk behaviour. Team of professionals in education sciences, philosophy, linguistics, health.

COMITE DE PARIS F S G T.activite_verifiee: FSGT 75 Committee — Paris Committee of the Workers' Sports and Gymnastics Federation (SIREN 784778797), 1901-act association. 35 avenue de Flandre Paris 19th. 12,500+ members and 2,000 volunteers, double Sport / Popular Education approval. One of the FSGT departmental committees (200,000 practitioners, 4,200 clubs).

COUP DE POUCE.activite_verifiee: Coup de Pouce association, created in 1989. School-success clubs (Coup de Pouce Clé for CP, Coup de Pouce CLEM for CE1) for children struggling with the basics, in partnership with the Ministry of National Education and the City of Paris. Sessions 3 evenings/week after school, free, groups of 5-6, trained leaders.

ASSOCIATION COUP DE POUCE.activite_verifiee: Coup de Pouce association, created in 1989. School-success clubs (Coup de Pouce Clé for CP, Coup de Pouce CLEM for CE1) for children struggling with the basics, in partnership with the Ministry of National Education and the City of Paris. Sessions 3 evenings/week after school, free, groups of 5-6, trained leaders.

CLUB D ESCRIME TOUR D AUVERGNE.activite_verifiee: Tour d'Auvergne Fencing Club (TA), 26 rue Buffault Paris 9th (Buffault gymnasium). Established in the 9th since 1884. Foil for all ages (children from age 4 to veterans), 538 members in 2024-2025 (2nd French club by member count). 7 world champions, 5 European, 66 French from the club.

FEMMES INITIATIVES.activite_verifiee: Femmes Initiatives Association (Paris). Qualiopi-certified training body. Learning of French (FLE, literacy) and sociocultural mediation for social inclusion; classes accessible at all levels with human support. Active in Paris.

ATELIER DU PLATEAU THEATRE ECARLATE.activite_verifiee: Atelier du Plateau — Théâtre Écarlate (SIREN 324192210), multidisciplinary residency and creation venue (circus, music, theatre). Former pipe factory Paris 19th, opened in 1999 by Gilles Zaepffel. Supported by City of Paris and DRAC IdF since 2001. Self-proclaimed 'first Neighbourhood National Drama Centre'. Directed by Matthieu Malgrange and Laetitia Zaepffel since 2005.

CINEMA CHAPLIN.activite_verifiee: Les Cinémas Chaplin — community network of two Parisian art-house cinemas: Chaplin Denfert (24 place Denfert-Rochereau Paris 14th, opened in 2011) and Chaplin Saint-Lambert (Paris 15th). Plural auteur cinema open to all: new releases + thematic retrospectives, documentaries, classics, press previews.

A P S A J.activite_verifiee: APSAJ — Specialised Prevention and Youth Support Association, born in 2018 from the ADCLJC (created 1968) + Maison des Copains de Villette merger. ~24 staff (educators, service heads, management). Premises: 76 rue Philippe de Girard and 25 rue Léon (Paris 18th), 156 rue d'Aubervilliers (Paris 19th). Street outreach, mediation, specialised prevention.

COLLEGE PIERRE DE RONSARD.activite_verifiee: Public Paris middle school (Pierre de Ronsard), secondary education establishment of the Paris academy. Grants paid by the City for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

GYM PARIS 15.activite_verifiee: Gym' Paris 15, gymnastics club of the 15th arrondissement created in 1996. Artistic gymnastics (F/M), rhythmic, parkour, baby gym, fitness for all ages. Main locations: Falguière gymnasium (144 rue Falguière) and Cévennes gymnasium. Certified coaches.

COLLEGE JEAN MOULIN.activite_verifiee: Public Paris middle school (Jean Moulin), secondary education establishment of the Paris academy. City of Paris grants for equipment and educational projects.

REGIE DE QUARTIER FECAMP 12.activite_verifiee: Régie de Quartier Fécamp 12 (Paris 12th), association created in 2010 in partnership with the City / social-housing operators / associations / residents. Inclusion enterprise approved by DRIEETS. Includes 12th-arrondissement residents on inclusion fixed-term contracts (long-term jobseekers, minimum-benefit recipients, seniors). 63 inclusion staff in 2023: cleaning, green spaces, roads.

HALTE AIDE AUX FEMMES BATTUES.activite_verifiee: HAFB — Refuge for Battered Women, 17 rue Mendelssohn Paris 20th. Pioneering association in Paris denouncing domestic violence as a specific phenomenon. Runs an ESI (Solidarity Inclusion Space) and the Louise Labé shelter (CHRS) for women victims. Member of the FNSF (3919).

PREMIERE URGENCE INTERNATIONALE.activite_verifiee: Première Urgence Internationale (PUI), French humanitarian NGO born in 2015 from the merger of Première Urgence and Aide Médicale Internationale. HQ 2 rue Auguste-Thomas Asnières-sur-Seine (92). 8 areas of expertise: health, nutrition, food security, water, sanitation, rehabilitation, economic recovery. 3,000 national staff + 200 expatriates in 22 countries, 6M beneficiaries/year.

ONDE ET CYBELE.activite_verifiee: L'Onde & Cybèle, association created in 2004 by Blaise Merlin, based in the 18th arrondissement. Hybrid production structure: festivals Rhizomes (music and gardens, three weekends in summer in the green spaces of the 18th and Aubervilliers) and La Voix est Libre (formerly Jazz Nomades). Artistic-practice workshops in priority neighbourhoods (Goutte d'Or) since 2007.

3 S SEJOUR SPORTIF SOLIDAIRE.activite_verifiee: Recyclerie Sportive — 3S Solidarity Sports Stay (SIREN 811475656), national association. Collection, sorting, co-repair and redistribution of sports equipment via solidarity shop. Mission: access to sport for all, local employment and professional inclusion of people in difficulty, waste reduction in the sports sector. Branches in Paris 17 and Bordeaux.

CYCLOFFICINE DE PARIS.activite_verifiee: La Cyclofficine de Paris, participatory and self-managed bike workshop created in 2010 (first workshop Saint-Blaise Paris 20th in 2012, second Fougères in 2014). Active mobility, reuse, popular education. Bike sales at modest prices, women/trans-only sessions, mobile workshops. Member of the RéPAR.

CLOCHE.activite_verifiee: La Cloche Association (1901-act, 2014). Creates social bonds between neighbours with and without homes through 2 programmes: Le Carillon (network of solidarity merchants in 14 Paris arrondissements offering small services to people in precarity) and Les Clochettes (inclusive shared neighbourhood gardens). Theatre/choir workshops, perception-changing training.

ACTION CONTRE LA FAIM.activite_verifiee: Action Contre la Faim (ACF), French international humanitarian NGO founded in 1979, dedicated to fighting hunger. Logistics platform in Paris. 5 areas of expertise: nutrition/health, mental health and care practices, food security, water/hygiene, advocacy. Helped 17M people in 49 countries in 2019.

GROUP INTER PUBLIC CAFES CULTURES.activite_verifiee: GIP Cafés Cultures, Public Interest Group created by decree of 31 March 2015. Public-private fund (Ministry of Culture + local authorities + private) supporting employment of artists and live-performance technicians in cafés, bars, restaurants and at occasional employers (committees, small municipalities, farms).

FRANCAIS LANGUE D ACCUEIL.activite_verifiee: Français Langue d'Accueil (FLA), Parisian association, 28 rue de l'Aqueduc Paris 10th. French learning (FLE, literacy, A1/A2/B1 levels) for non-French-speaking asylum seekers and refugees in the Paris region. Over 150 volunteers, ~20 classes/year in the 10th/18th/19th/20th. Support towards employment/training.

AGORANOV.activite_verifiee: Agoranov, 1901-act association created in 2000 by ENS, ParisTech, Paris-Dauphine and Sorbonne Université (joined by Inria). Hosted by Sorbonne Université, bd Raspail Paris 6th. Reference Deeptech incubator: ~30 start-ups/year over 24 months (deeptech, industry, digital, health). 450+ start-ups incubated, 5 unicorns (Ÿnsect, DNA Script…), 12,500 jobs, €2.5bn raised.

LIFE FOR PARIS 13 NOVEMBRE 2015.activite_verifiee: Life for Paris, association created on 1 December 2015 after a Facebook post by Maureen Roussel (Bataclan survivor), officialised on 13 January 2016. Composed exclusively of the 650+ direct victims of the 13 November 2015 attacks (Bataclan, terraces, Stade de France) + families, first responders. Mutual aid, improvement of support arrangements, resilience.

ORIGAMIX.activite_verifiee: Origami Association, drop-in nursery created in 1997, 8 rue de Prague Paris 12th (Faubourg Saint-Antoine neighbourhood). Reception of children from walking age to 6 years for occasional childcare needs. Team: EJE director, EJE, paediatric nursing aide, early-childhood CAP.

ORIGAMI.activite_verifiee: Origami Association, drop-in nursery created in 1997, 8 rue de Prague Paris 12th (Faubourg Saint-Antoine neighbourhood). Reception of children from walking age to 6 years for occasional childcare needs. Team: EJE director, EJE, paediatric nursing aide, early-childhood CAP.

D UNE LANGUE A L AUTRE DULALA.activite_verifiee: DULALA — From One Language to Another (SIREN 512183872), association created in 2009, resource and training centre on bilingualism and multilingual education. Language-awakening workshops (1-12 years), professional training (education, early childhood, social, health), innovative tools. 30,000+ children and 9,000 professionals reached. Labelled by Ashoka, Fondation de France, SNCF.

INALCO.activite_verifiee: INALCO — National Institute of Oriental Languages and Civilisations ('Langues O''), grand public higher-education and research institution created in 1795. Campus 65 rue des Grands-Moulins Paris 13th since 2011. 104 languages taught (largest catalogue in the world). Bachelor's to PhD, continuing education. Branches in Singapore, Buenos Aires, São Paulo.

ACP LA MANUFACTURE CHANSON.activite_verifiee: ACP la Manufacture Chanson, SCOP (formerly association) 124 avenue de la République Paris 11th. Songwriting school founded in 1981 by Christian Dente (formerly Ateliers Chanson de Paris, became ACP in 2000). Vocational training centre for singer-songwriter-performers, Espace Christian Dente venue (50 seats), open mic, residencies.

CINELBA SA.activite_verifiee: Cinelba SA (SIREN 572066603), SAS running the Le Balzac cinema (1 rue Balzac Paris 8th). Cinema operation / film projection. Chairman: David Henochsberg. Capital €40,000, started in April 1989.

BIS BOUTIQUE SOLIDAIRE.activite_verifiee: BIS Boutique Solidaire, Parisian textile inclusion enterprise — solidarity and circular fashion. 45 staff including 27 in inclusion (training in sewing, logistics, sales). 1,000 m² supply centre in Vitry-sur-Seine; 600 tonnes of textiles/year, 230,000 items sold. 4 shops (Marais, Montmartre, 15th, 14th) + donations to ~5,000 Parisians/year.

RESSOURCERIE CREATIVE.activite_verifiee: La Ressourcerie Créative, reuse association created in September 2015 at the Grands Voisins site (former Saint-Vincent-de-Paul). Based since October 2020 at 95 avenue du Général Leclerc Paris 14th. Collection, sorting, revalorisation and upcycling; weekly creative workshops for children and adults. Hosts young people on emplois d'avenir contracts.

PARIS 13 TENNIS DE TABLE.activite_verifiee: Paris 13 Tennis de Table (P13TT), table-tennis club created in 1972 under Centre Daviel. 25 avenue de la Porte d'Ivry Paris 13th (dedicated Carpentier hall). 400+ members — largest club in Île-de-France. Affiliated FFTT, FFH, RCP. Partner of the 13th-arrondissement city hall, six certified coaches.

ASSOCIATION ART EXPRIM 18.activite_verifiee: Art-exprim, 1901-act association created in 2000. Workshops 87 rue Marcadet Paris 18th (+ 7 rue Pierre Mauroy at Chapelle International). Contemporary art accessible to all: 8 disciplines (visual arts, drawing, comics, manga, sculpture…) for children from age 3, teenagers and adults. 9 visiting artists, sliding-scale fees.

LUTINLUNE.activite_verifiee: Lutinlune parental crèche, 1901-act association created in December 1986, 37 rue de la Réunion Paris 20th. 16 places (2.5 months - 3.5 years), open 8:15am-6:30pm. Strong parental involvement: ~4 half-days/month + community task. Funded by CAF + City of Paris + parental contributions.

PETIT CONCEPT.activite_verifiee: Petit Concept, Parisian cultural association (limited detailed public information, likely linked to live performance / artistic creation).

TECHNOPOL TECHNO PARADE.activite_verifiee: Technopol — Techno Parade, association created in 1996 after the cancellation of Polaris in Lyon. Reference structure in France for electronic cultures, defence of DJ/producer status, harm reduction in festive settings, lobbying public authorities. Runs the Techno Parade (created in 1998 by Jack Lang): 400,000 participants each year, + Paris Electronic Week.

ASSOCIATION FOYER JORBALAN.activite_verifiee: AFJ — Foyer Jorbalan Association, created in 1967 by the Adoratrices Congregation. HQ MDA 19 AFJ box 99, 20 rue Édouard Pailleron Paris 19th. Emergency shelter for migrant women victims of trafficking for sexual exploitation (TEHS); 17 places, ~40 victims received/year, multidisciplinary support (medical, mental-health, legal, educational).

FOYER JORBALAN.activite_verifiee: AFJ — Foyer Jorbalan Association, created in 1967 by the Adoratrices Congregation. HQ MDA 19 AFJ box 99, 20 rue Édouard Pailleron Paris 19th. Emergency shelter for migrant women victims of trafficking for sexual exploitation (TEHS); 17 places, ~40 victims received/year, multidisciplinary support (medical, mental-health, legal, educational).

STUDIO DES URSULINES.activite_verifiee: Studio des Ursulines, 10 rue des Ursulines Paris 5th. First art-house cinema in France (1925, founded by Laurence Myrga and Armand Tallier). First AFCAE member in 1955. Labels: Young Audience, Heritage and Repertoire, Short Films, 15-25. Children's programming; launch of the Benshi.fr platform in 2016.

CAPUCINE ET PAPILLONS JARDIN D ENFA.activite_verifiee: Capucine et Papillons, Childhood Garden (SIREN 481586964), 1901-act association founded in 2002, 35 rue Clisson Paris 13th. Parental/community crèche; 6-9 staff, educational approach focused on exploration, creativity, learning.

RUGBY CLUB PARIS 15.activite_verifiee: Rugby Club Paris 15 (RCP15), rugby section of Omnisport Paris 15 created in 1971. Suzanne-Lenglen stadium Paris 15th. 950 members: 4 men's senior teams, 2 women's senior teams, juniors, cadets, rugby school. Île-de-France Régionale 1 champion → promotion to Fédérale 3. Introduction actions in schools and priority neighbourhoods.

CIMADE SERVICE OECUMENIQUE ENTRAIDE.activite_verifiee: La Cimade — Ecumenical Mutual Aid Service (SIREN 775666597), ecumenical association created in 1939 to assist displaced people from camps in southern France. HQ 176 rue de Grenelle Paris 7th. 110,000+ migrants, refugees and asylum seekers received each year in drop-in services; shelter in Béziers and Massy (~200 places). Rights defence, anti-discrimination advocacy.

ATELIERS DU CHAUDRON.activite_verifiee: Ateliers du Chaudron, Parisian theatre and music company. Initially at the Cartoucherie de Vincennes (1972-1999), relocated by the City to the Fontaine au Roi neighbourhood (Paris 11th). Fusion of theatrical art and social theatre for 40+ years; jazz-rooted improvised music. Theatrical and musical productions on site and elsewhere.

AS SPORT LYCEE ENS COMM MARIA DERA.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (AS SPORT LYCEE ENS COMM MARIA DERA), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

ASS SPORTIVE DU COLLEGE FLORA TRIST.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (ASS SPORTIVE DU COLLEGE FLORA TRIST), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

ASSOCIATION SPORTIVE DU LYCEE MOLIE.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (ASSOCIATION SPORTIVE DU LYCEE MOLIE), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

ASS SPORTIVE COLLEGE GUY FLAVIEN.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (ASS SPORTIVE COLLEGE GUY FLAVIEN), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

LYCEE TECHNOLOGIQUE SIMONE WEIL.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (LYCEE TECHNOLOGIQUE SIMONE WEIL), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

ASSOCIATION SPORTIVE LYCEE HONORE DE BAL.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (ASSOCIATION SPORTIVE LYCEE HONORE DE BALZAC), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

ASSOC SPORTIF COLLEGE CLAUDE DEBUSS.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (ASSOC SPORTIF COLLEGE CLAUDE DEBUSS), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

SPORTIF COLLEGE CLAUDE DEBUSS.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (SPORTIF COLLEGE CLAUDE DEBUSS), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

SPORTIVE LYCEE D ALEMBERT.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (SPORTIVE LYCEE D ALEMBERT), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

AS SPORTIVE DU LYCEE TURGOT.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (AS SPORTIVE DU LYCEE TURGOT), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

ASS SPORT LYCEE PROF M DEPREZ.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (ASS SPORT LYCEE PROF M DEPREZ), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

COLLEGE CESAR FRANCK.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (COLLEGE CESAR FRANCK), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

LYCEE POLYVALENT ET DES METIERS DOR.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (LYCEE POLYVALENT ET DES METIERS DOR), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

COLLEGE CHARLEMAGNE.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (COLLEGE CHARLEMAGNE), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

ASSOCIATION SPORTIVE DU COLLEGE.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (ASSOCIATION SPORTIVE DU COLLEGE), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

COLLEGE HENRI MATISSE.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (COLLEGE HENRI MATISSE), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

LYCEE GENERAL HELENE BOUCHER.activite_verifiee: Public Paris school facility (LYCEE GENERAL HELENE BOUCHER), under the Paris academy. City grants for equipment, educational projects, trips and school catering.

CENTRE EPINETTES FAMIL INSERTION AC.activite_verifiee: CEFIA — Épinettes Family Reception Inclusion Community Centre (SIREN 399990696), 29-year-old association, 102 rue de la Jonquière Paris 17th. Community centre of the Épinettes neighbourhood: sociolinguistic workshops (ASL) for 20+ years, school support, social and cultural activities, family reception.

CRECHE LES GARDONS.activite_verifiee: Les Gardons, community parental crèche (SIREN 340163948), active since 1 November 1986, 15 rue Montgallet Paris 12th (Picpus). Collective reception of children aged 3 months to kindergarten entry. Strong parental involvement (5 hours/week + regular meetings), management by parents + professionals.

FETART.activite_verifiee: Collectif Fetart, association promoting young European photography. Organises the Circulation(s) festival at CENTQUATRE-PARIS since 2011 (225+ artists exhibited, 250,000 visitors) and the Photographic Encounters of the 10th arrondissement since 2017. Open call for applications, young European photographers.

SAUVEGARDE DE L ADOLESCENCE.activite_verifiee: Sauvegarde de l'Adolescence à Paris, association created in 1929 (RUP 1934). 95 staff, 6,000 people or families helped/year. Child protection, home-based AEMO, housing support for under-30s, shelter for 18-25, CIEJ (Youth Employment Initiative Centre), SIOE (educational investigation and orientation).

PROGENITURE.activite_verifiee: Progéniture Association, Parisian parental crèche (limited detailed public information).

PARIS ALESIA FOOTBALL CLUB.activite_verifiee: Paris Alésia FC, football club of the 14th arrondissement. Élisabeth stadium (15 avenue Paul Appell Paris 14th). 18-24 mixed teams in all categories (season 25-26): football school, youth, men's/women's senior, recreational. Camps and tournaments. Affiliated FFF.

COMPAGNONS BATISSEURS ILE DE FRANCE.activite_verifiee: Compagnons Bâtisseurs Île-de-France (CBIDF), created in 2012, operating in 75/78/93/94/95. Supported Self-Renovation (ARA) of housing to fight bad housing. 30 staff + volunteers + civic-service members. 13 neighbourhood workshops + 7 mobile tool libraries. 2023: 208 projects, 487 educational repairs, 85 administrative aids, 1,197+ people supported.

NOUVELLE ETOILE DES ENFANTS DE.activite_verifiee: La Nouvelle Étoile des Enfants de France, secular and RUP association created in 1891 by three women, 130+ years of action for child protection. 'La Nouvelle Étoile' maternity centre (isolated pregnant women or with 1 child < 3 years old). Pioneering: first crèches, first hygiene centres, first PMI, first paediatric-nursing schools.

NOUVELLE ETOILE DES ENFANTS DE F.activite_verifiee: La Nouvelle Étoile des Enfants de France, secular and RUP association created in 1891 by three women, 130+ years of action for child protection. 'La Nouvelle Étoile' maternity centre (isolated pregnant women or with 1 child < 3 years old). Pioneering: first crèches, first hygiene centres, first PMI, first paediatric-nursing schools.

ACTIV ACTION.activite_verifiee: Activ'Action, association for collective support of jobseekers (Paris + other cities). Peer workshops to identify strengths, build action plans, develop confidence. Response to the psycho-social risks of unemployment. Member of the Ashoka network, La France s'engage 2021 winner.

KTHA COMPAGNIE.activite_verifiee: ktha compagnie, street-theatre company created in 2000. Grant-funded by the City of Paris, DRAC IdF, Île-de-France Region. Intimate theatre in devices set up in public spaces (containers, trucks, rooftops, car parks, stadiums, roundabouts, metro). Collective urban projects (Petites Urbanités Libres Paris 20th in 2011), ZEF (monthly support scheme).

EBS LE RELAIS NORD PAS DE CALAIS.activite_verifiee: EBS Le Relais Nord Pas-de-Calais (SCOP), HQ Bruay-la-Buissière (62). Socio-Economic Purpose Enterprise specialised in textile, household-linen and shoe collection, sorting and recovery. French leader: 120,000+ tonnes in 2023 (55% of French collection). Network of 30 local Relais, 22,000+ collection points. Approved as inclusion enterprise.

KODIKO.activite_verifiee: Kodiko Association, professional inclusion of refugees through a 6-month refugee-employee co-training programme (2 monthly meetings). Conditions: international protection + minimum A2 French. Supports learning company codes, the labour market, CVs, networking. Collective workshops. ~3,000 refugees supported since creation.

CARLOTTA CINEMAS.activite_verifiee: Carlotta Films (SIREN 418717401), French film distribution and video publishing company founded in 1998 by Vincent Paul-Boncour and Jean-Pierre Gardelli. Specialised in promoting heritage cinema: theatrical distribution (restored prints), DVD/Blu-ray/VOD publishing, bookshop. HQ 74 rue de Charenton Paris 12th.

AUTEUIL PETITE ENFANCE.activite_verifiee: Auteuil Petite Enfance (APE), 1901-act association founded in 2010, early-childhood structure of the Apprentis d'Auteuil Foundation. HQ 40 rue Jean de La Fontaine Paris 16th. 21 early-childhood reception facilities (EAJE) + parent-child reception centres + parenting support; ~1,000 children/year, 220 staff. Early prevention and parenting support.

OBSERVATOIRE INT PRISONS SECTION FR.activite_verifiee: OIP-SF — International Prison Observatory, French Section, 1901-act association created on 17 June 1995 in Lyon, French section of the OIP (founded in 1990). UN consultative status. HQ 7 bis rue Riquet Paris 19th. Defence of human rights in prison, observations through correspondents in detention, legal support to detainees and relatives, advocacy against carceral inflation.

CASERNE EPHEMERE.activite_verifiee: Usines Éphémères / La Caserne Éphémère — association running Point Éphémère (200-206 quai de Valmy Paris 10th since 2004) and network linked to Hôpital Éphémère and Mains d'Œuvres. Former docks of the Saint-Martin Canal turned into an artistic and cultural centre: 300-seat concert hall, 120 m² exhibition space, 4 visual-arts studios, dance studios, 5 music studios, bar-restaurant. Artist residencies up to 6 months.

ASSOCIATION JEUNES TALENTS.activite_verifiee: Jeunes Talents, association created in 1998, recognised as being of public utility in 2019. Organises ~140 concerts/year (season + Festival Européen Jeunes Talents in July) to promote young classical musicians aged 18-26, graduates of the Paris and Lyon CNSMs or top European schools, all paid.

EPICERIE SOLIDAIRE COURTE ECHELLE.activite_verifiee: La Courte Échelle Solidarity Grocery (SIREN 411459464), 8 rue Gaston Tessier Paris 19th. Social grocery: food and hygiene products at reduced prices on referral by social services. Fights exclusion, raises awareness of nutritional health and responsible consumption.

PARIS CYCLISTE OLYMPIQUE.activite_verifiee: Paris Cycliste Olympique (PCO), cycling club founded in 1991. HQ at the Jacques-Anquetil velodrome (La Cipale, Bois de Vincennes Paris 12th). ~250 members aged 7 to 70. Road, track, cyclo-cross, cycling school, DN1 Road team (elite amateur). Runs the national 'Savoir Rouler à Vélo' programme in schools, organises Mercredis Populaires and the GP OMS Paris 14.

TENNIS CLUB DU 12 ARRDT.activite_verifiee: Community tennis club of the 12th arrondissement of Paris (TC12 Bercy / RNS Tennis / La Camillienne / Panda depending on name). Léo-Lagrange, Alain-Mimoun, Carnot, La Faluère courts — children's and adult lessons, competition and recreational play.

ABIOSOL.activite_verifiee: ABIOSOL — Solidarity Organic Agriculture, hub created in 2009 (structured as an association in 2019). Made up of GAB IdF, Terre de Liens IdF, Les Champs des Possibles, Réseau AMAP IdF. Supports the establishment of organic solidarity farmers in Île-de-France (welcome meetings, training, visits, individual follow-up). 203 candidates received, 92% from outside the agricultural family.

AMICALE DU NID.activite_verifiee: Amicale du Nid, secular and apolitical association. Supports people in or at risk of prostitution: reception, support, inclusion, prevention, training, territorial diagnosis. 16 départements, 4,800+ people met and 5,000+ supported/year, 400+ housed. Amicale du Nid 75 + Coallia partnership (CPH/HUDA 75 places, TEHS). Abolitionist position.

UJA MACCABI PARIS METROPOLE.activite_verifiee: UJA Maccabi Paris Métropole, football club born in 2012 from the merger of UJA Alfortville (founded 1926 by the Armenian community of Alfortville) + Maccabi Paris (founded 1947, sports club of the Parisian Jewish community). 21 senior men's/women's and youth teams, plays in R3 Île-de-France. Navy/yellow colours, cultural and social-solidarity mission.

AU FIL DE LA DECOUVERTE.activite_verifiee: Au Fil de la Découverte, community drop-in nursery, 6 rue de Cronstadt Paris 15th. Occasional reception of young children (up to 3 half-days/week).

LOUISE ROSIER KIDS.activite_verifiee: Louise Rosier Kids (SIREN 831206867), non-profit association 206 quai de Valmy Paris 10th. Awareness for children of 'eating well' through cooking workshops and nutrition games in priority Paris schools, in partnership with chefs and dietitians. Partly funded by the City of Paris.

COMPAGNIE A L AFFUT.activite_verifiee: Compagnie à l'Affût, created in 2002 by Nour Jlassi. Based in Paris 13th, with social and solidarity character — democratisation of culture in priority neighbourhoods. 'Théâtre Outil' project: forum theatre creating dialogue spaces. Three amateur troupes (Petits Affûtés, Jeunes Affûtés, Affûtés), Festival des Affûtés every summer since 2013.

ECOLE CHIEN GUIDE AVEUGLE PARIS REG.activite_verifiee: Paris Guide Dog School, 1901-act general-interest association inaugurated in 1987. HQ 105 avenue de Saint-Maurice Paris 12th (Bois de Vincennes) + second site in Buc (78) since 2015 (breeding and training). Breeds, trains and freely provides ~30 guide dogs/year to blind or visually-impaired people. 1,100+ dogs delivered in 29 years.

GRS PARIS CENTRE.activite_verifiee: GRS Paris Centre, Parisian rhythmic gymnastics club. Training in several gymnasiums (Berlioux Forum des Halles, Bercy-Bastille, Léopold-Bellan, Lacretelle, Maurice-Ravel lycée). Introduction to national competition, ball/ribbon/hoop/rope/clubs apparatus, individual and group practice, summer camps.

SOC PUBLIQUE LOCALE CARREAU TEMPLE.activite_verifiee: SPL Le Carreau du Temple / Paris & Métropole Aménagement — runs the hybrid culture-sport-event facility Paris 3rd (Carreau du Temple covered market), 4,000 m², auditorium, modular space. 100% City of Paris capital.

TRAVAIL ET PARTAGE.activite_verifiee: Travail et Partage, Parisian association (possibly linked to food solidarity / street rounds). Limited detailed public information.

CENTRE MANDAPA.activite_verifiee: Centre Mandapa, performance venue and Indian arts school founded in 1975, 6 rue Wurtz Paris 13th. ~200 performances/season (including 50+ concerts), priority to young audiences. Indian classical dances (bharata natyam, kathak, kathakali, odissi), music, Indian theatre, Arabo-Andalusian music. Workshops and classes.

ASSOCIATION CENTRE MANDAPA.activite_verifiee: Centre Mandapa, performance venue and Indian arts school founded in 1975, 6 rue Wurtz Paris 13th. ~200 performances/season (including 50+ concerts), priority to young audiences. Indian classical dances (bharata natyam, kathak, kathakali, odissi), music, Indian theatre, Arabo-Andalusian music. Workshops and classes.

CINEPOQUE.activite_verifiee: Cinépoque, Parisian association linked to cinema/festival (limited detailed public information).

MOTO ACTION.activite_verifiee: Moto Action, Parisian association for youth inclusion through motorbike mechanics / motorsports (limited detailed public information).

CENTRE THEATRE DE L OPPRIME AUGUSTO.activite_verifiee: Centre du Théâtre de l'Opprimé (CTO-Paris), 78-80 rue du Charolais Paris 12th (since 1995). Founded in Paris in March 1979 by Augusto Boal (CEDITADE). Directed since 1998 by Rui Frati. Theatre of the Oppressed method: forum theatre, image theatre, rainbow of desire, invisible theatre — making social and political conflicts visible.

V R A C VER RESEAU ACHAT COMM PARIS.activite_verifiee: VRAC — Towards a Common Purchasing Network. Association developing buying groups in priority Paris neighbourhoods (and elsewhere): farmer/organic/fair-trade products in short supply chains at low prices, monthly orders via cagette.net. Membership from €1, solidarity fund. 23 territories in France/Belgium, 22 associations, 10,300+ member households, 124 buying groups.

COLLECTIF ACCIDENT TRAVAIL HANDICAP.activite_verifiee: CATRED — Collective of Workplace-Accident Victims, Disabled and Retired People for Equal Rights (SIREN 390223840). 20 boulevard Voltaire Paris 11th. 1901-act association, individual socio-legal support for social protection. 4 areas: access to rights, language support, digital services, employment.

ASSOCIATION MAINS LIBRES.activite_verifiee: Mains Libres Association (Paris), community structure linked to deafness or professional inclusion (limited detailed public information).

LUCERNAIRE FORUM.activite_verifiee: Lucernaire Forum, cultural centre founded in 1968 by Christian Le Guillochet, Luce Berthommé and Laurent Terzieff, based since 1978 at 53 rue Notre-Dame-des-Champs Paris 6th (former factory). 3 theatres (Théâtre Noir 116 seats, Théâtre Rouge 116 seats, Le Paradis 46 seats) + 3 art-house cinemas + exhibition gallery + bookshop + bar-restaurant. Contemporary creation, classics, young audiences.

COMITE PARISIEN DE BASKET BALL.activite_verifiee: Paris Basketball Committee (CD75), Parisian departmental body of the FFBB. 117 rue du Château des Rentiers Paris 13th. 50+ affiliated clubs, 7,000+ members, president Oumar Samba Dia. 7 commissions (Sports, etc.) to organise championships, training, competitions in Paris.

GUINGETTE PIRATE.activite_verifiee: La Guinguette Pirate (formerly Péniche Le Loceynius), association arrived at the foot of the BNF on 1 April 1995 (Chinese junk). First concert-boat in eastern Paris, Port de la Gare Paris 13th. Creator of the Batofar (1999) then Petit Bain (2011). Runs the 'L'Odyssée' project (sport, culture, solidarity around the Île-de-France waterways).

JEUNESSE ATHLETIQUE DE MONTROUGE.activite_verifiee: JAM — Jeunesse Athlétique de Montrouge, Parisian multi-sport club created in 1896 (association in 1904), 5 rue du Moulin-Vert Paris 14th. Athletics, football, table tennis, volleyball, swimming, tennis, adapted sports. 130+ years of activity in the 14th, blue-and-white colours.

SOC EXPL CHAMPOLLION.activite_verifiee: Société d'Exploitation Le Champo — Espace Jacques-Tati, independent art-house cinema at 51 rue des Écoles (corner of rue Champollion) Paris 5th. Created in 1938, haunt of the Nouvelle Vague (Truffaut, Godard, Chabrol). 2 screens (Champollion and Henri-Langlois). Rare mirror back-projection system in France. Listed historic monument since 2000.

COMITE DEPARTEM SPORT ADAPTE PARIS.activite_verifiee: CDSA 75 — Paris Departmental Adapted Sports Committee, 182 rue Raymond Losserand Paris 14th. Sports for people with intellectual or psychiatric disabilities. FFSA (French Adapted Sports Federation) local structure. 50 partner Adapted Sports Centres in 10 arrondissements.

MA PLUME EST A VOUS.activite_verifiee: Ma Plume est à Vous, 1901-act association created in March 1997, 6 avenue de la Porte de Montmartre Paris 18th. Volunteer public scribes: help reading/writing administrative or private letters for people far from writing (literacy, French-as-foreign-language, precarity). ~20 volunteers + 3 staff, social mediation through writing.

FABRIQUE DOCUMENTAIRE.activite_verifiee: La Fabrique Documentaire, association created in 2005 by journalist-documentarians Benjamin Bibas and Emmanuel Chicon, based Paris 20th. Reports and documentaries (text, radio, video, web, exhibitions) on human rights, the environment, the media. Since 2015, organises free public-space film festivals in northeast Paris and Seine-Saint-Denis.

FOYER DE GRENELLE CENTRE SOCIAL.activite_verifiee: Foyer de Grenelle, RUP community centre founded in 1884 by pastor McAll after the Commune. 17 rue de l'Avre Paris 15th. ~1,000 people/week. Approved by CAF, City and Department. 3 hubs: digital access, French learning, access to law; legal consultation, housing, school support, repair café, youth and seniors.

CTE FR DE SOUTIEN GK SAVAR BANGLA.activite_verifiee: Comité Français de Soutien à GK Savar Bangladesh, Parisian international-solidarity association supporting Gonoshasthaya Kendra (GK), pioneering Bangladeshi popular-health and access-to-care NGO in Savar (near Dhaka). (Limited public details.)

DISPO APPUI PERINAT SOINS AMBULATOI.activite_verifiee: DAPSA — Perinatal and Outpatient Care Support Scheme, Parisian support and coordination structure in perinatality + addictions/parenting (limited public information; likely supports professionals and families).

PASSERELLE ASSIST AIDANT RESAF.activite_verifiee: RESAF — Parisian Passerelle Assist'Aidant scheme supporting family carers (caregivers; limited public information).

EMPLOI DEVELOPPEMENT.activite_verifiee: Emploi Développement, Parisian employment-support association (inclusion, training, mentoring — limited detailed public information).

COMITE DEPARTEMENTAL DE RUGBY DE PA.activite_verifiee: CD75 — Paris Departmental Rugby Committee. FFR contact for Paris clubs: 4,000+ members across 7 clubs. Liaison between clubs, Île-de-France League and Federation. Commissions: training, safety, finance, events, institutional relations.

JUSTICE DEUXIEME CHANCE.activite_verifiee: Justice Deuxième Chance (J2C), Île-de-France association supporting People Under Judicial Supervision (PPSMJ) towards and into employment. Activities in Île-de-France (75, 92, 93, 78). 'Un Métier, Une Chance' programme in 3 Île-de-France prisons. Personalised support (open environment + detention) for social and professional reintegration.

COMITE ACTION SOCIAL OUTRE MER.activite_verifiee: CASODOM — Social Action Committee for People from Overseas Departments in metropolitan France (SIREN 784180374), created in 1956, RUP in 1973. 7 bis rue du Louvre Paris 1st. Social service for overseas residents in metropolitan France: reception, orientation, access to rights, housing, employment/training, emergency financial aid.

OPTIMA.activite_verifiee: Optima — Mediation, Training, Advice, Parisian association (15th) specialised in mediation, training, advice, real-estate renovation. MSADS and AMIS programmes (training and return to employment).

UN MONDE GOURMAND.activite_verifiee: Un Monde Gourmand, solidarity restaurant and inclusion enterprise (EI). 18 rue Poissonnière Paris 2nd. Since 2005, professional inclusion in catering trades (experience + training). Homemade cuisine with fresh, seasonal, organic, zero-waste products, bike deliveries (EI partner). Solidarity caterer. Menus from €15.

CHINOIS DE FRANCE FRANCAIS DE CHINE.activite_verifiee: CFFC — Chinese of France French of China (SIREN 531394740), association created in 1998, based in the Grand Belleville Paris 19th/20th. French and Chinese training for adults and children, Sinophone and Francophone speakers. Social and cultural mediation, neighbourhood activities, integration of Chinese migration (Wenzhou, Dongbei).

ACADEMIE FOOTBALL PARIS 18.activite_verifiee: AFP18 — Paris 18 Football Academy, association created in March 2015. Makes football a vehicle for civic and popular education in the priority neighbourhood Portes du 18e. ~1,000 members; 2 projects: sports + socio-educational. School support Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri 4:30-7:15pm at the Maison Bleue community centre (24 avenue de la Porte Montmartre Paris 18th). Member of La Voix de l'Enfant, FFF labelled.

FASHION GREEN HUB GRAND PARIS.activite_verifiee: Fashion Green Hub Grand Paris, Île-de-France version of Fashion Green Hub (business association founded in Roubaix in 2015, sustainable/circular/inclusive fashion). Opens in December 2022 the Plateau Fertile Paris at the Berlier industrial building (13th): circular and solidarity fashion factory, Qualiopi training centre, circular materials library, responsible production workshops.

DANUBE PALACE.activite_verifiee: Le Danube Palace — Bouillon d'Cultures, SSE sociocultural association created in 2007 in the Danube-Solidarité-Marseillaise neighbourhood Paris 19th. Cultural café open to the public on 10 September 2019, 12 rue de la Solidarité (Danube/Ourcq metro). IT classes, pottery/sculpture/ceramics, creative workshops, film debates, weekly events (concerts, stand-up, magic), coworking.

SENSECUBE.activite_verifiee: SenseCube, social incubator created by makesense in 2014 in Paris (taken over by the makesense organisation). Supports start-ups with strong societal impact in the early-stage phase (concept, project, young start-up). 9 months of personalised coaching, 2 work spaces in Paris, 40 collective training sessions, ~€100k in partner benefits. International expansion: Mexico, Peru, Senegal, Lebanon, Philippines.

VIACTI.activite_verifiee: Viacti, sport-and-health association promoting Adapted Physical Activity and Health (APAS) as a vehicle for autonomy and integration. Based in Paris 12th + Chelles + Clichy. Audiences: people with physical/psychological/social disabilities, seniors. Collective or individual APAS workshops, free sports events, awareness and training.

KORHOM.activite_verifiee: Korhom, association created in November 2010, 156 rue d'Aubervilliers Paris 19th. Human-rights education through experience-based pedagogy, play, group work. Workshops for all audiences (from age 6, schools, middle schools, community centres, associations) + adult training. Inclusion arrangements for disabled people.

ECOUTE INTERCULT DISPOSIT INTER PSY.activite_verifiee: Parisian intercultural-listening and psychiatric-interpretation scheme: support for mental-health professionals in caring for migrants. Close to Centre Françoise Minkowska / Parcours d'Exil / AMSK (limited public details depending on exact entity).

MAISON DES FEMMES DE PARIS.activite_verifiee: Maison des Femmes de Paris (MDF), 1901-act association founded in 1981, 163 rue de Charenton Paris 12th. Secular feminist reception, solidarity and initiative space. Access to rights, fight against gender-based violence, employment action (2 annual sessions), legal/social services for deaf women victims of violence, cultural activities.
